authors_text: Aliya Amirova,Theodora Fteropoulli,Nafiso Ahmed,Martin R. Cowie,Joel Z. Leibo
title: Framework-Based Qualitative Analysis of Free Responses of Large Language Models: Algorithmic Fidelity
title_zh: 基于框架的大型语言模型自由响应的定性分析：算法保真度
abstract: Today, using Large-scale generative Language Models (LLMs) it is possible to simulate free responses to interview questions like those traditionally analyzed using qualitative research methods. Qualitative methodology encompasses a broad family of techniques involving manual analysis of open-ended interviews or conversations conducted freely in natural language. Here we consider whether artificial "silicon participants" generated by LLMs may be productively studied using qualitative methods aiming to produce insights that could generalize to real human populations. The key concept in our analysis is algorithmic fidelity, a term introduced by Argyle et al. (2023) capturing the degree to which LLM-generated outputs mirror human sub-populations' beliefs and attitudes. By definition, high algorithmic fidelity suggests latent beliefs elicited from LLMs may generalize to real humans, whereas low algorithmic fidelity renders such research invalid. Here we used an LLM to generate interviews with silicon participants matching specific demographic characteristics one-for-one with a set of human participants. Using framework-based qualitative analysis, we showed the key themes obtained from both human and silicon participants were strikingly similar. However, when we analyzed the structure and tone of the interviews we found even more striking differences. We also found evidence of the hyper-accuracy distortion described by Aher et al. (2023). We conclude that the LLM we tested (GPT-3.5) does not have sufficient algorithmic fidelity to expect research on it to generalize to human populations. However, the rapid pace of LLM research makes it plausible this could change in the future. Thus we stress the need to establish epistemic norms now around how to assess validity of LLM-based qualitative research, especially concerning the need to ensure representation of heterogeneous lived experiences.

Here we used an LLM to generate interviews with silicon participants matching specific demographic characteristics one-for-one with a set of human participants. abstract_zh: 如今，使用大规模生成语言模型（LLM）可以模拟对面试问题的自由回答，就像传统上使用定性研究方法分析的问题一样。定性方法涵盖一系列广泛的技术，涉及对以自然语言自由进行的开放式访谈或对话进行手动分析。在这里，我们考虑是否可以使用定性方法对法学硕士生成的人工“硅参与者”进行富有成效的研究，旨在产生可以推广到真实人群的见解。我们分析中的关键概念是算法保真度，这是 Argyle 等人引入的术语。 (2023) 捕捉了法学硕士生成的输出在多大程度上反映了人类亚群体的信念和态度。根据定义，高算法保真度表明法学硕士得出的潜在信念可以推广到真实的人类，而低算法保真度则使此类研究无效。在这里，我们使用法学硕士对硅参与者进行采访，并将特定的人口统计特征与一组人类参与者一对一匹配。使用基于框架的定性分析，我们发现从人类和芯片参与者那里获得的关键主题惊人地相似。然而，当我们分析采访的结构和语气时，我们发现了更显着的差异。我们还发现了 Aher 等人描述的超准确失真的证据。 （2023）。我们得出的结论是，我们测试的法学硕士 (GPT-3.5) 没有足够的算法保真度，无法期望对其研究推广到人类群体。然而，法学硕士研究的快速发展使得这种情况在未来可能会发生变化。因此，我们强调现在需要围绕如何评估基于法学硕士的定性研究的有效性建立认知规范，特别是需要确保异质生活经历的代表性。

AI.tldr: 评估大型语言模型（LLM）生成的“硅基参与者”在质性访谈研究中是否具有足够的算法保真度，以使其结果能推广到真实人类群体。
AI.motivation: 探究LLM生成的自由文本响应能否通过传统质性研究方法产生对真实人群具有普适性的洞察，并检验算法保真度这一概念的有效性。
AI.method: 使用LLM（GPT-3.5）生成与特定人口统计特征一一对应的“硅基参与者”访谈数据，采用框架性质性分析，将人类参与者和硅基参与者的关键主题、结构和语气进行比较。
AI.result: 人类与硅基参与者的关键主题高度相似，但在访谈的结构和语气上存在显著差异；同时发现超准确性扭曲现象。
AI.conclusion: GPT-3.5的算法保真度不足以支持基于其生成的质性研究结果推广到真实人类群体，但未来LLM的进步可能改变这一状况，因此亟需建立评估LLM质性研究有效性的认知规范。

authors_text: Arijit Ghosh Chowdhury,Aman Chadha
title: Generative Data Augmentation using LLMs improves Distributional Robustness in Question Answering
title_zh: 使用法学硕士的生成数据增强提高了问答中的分布稳健性
comment: 10 tables, 1 figure, To appear at EACL 2024 Student Research Workshop
comments: 10 tables, 1 figure, To appear at EACL 2024 Student Research Workshop
abstract: Robustness in Natural Language Processing continues to be a pertinent issue, where state of the art models under-perform under naturally shifted distributions. In the context of Question Answering, work on domain adaptation methods continues to be a growing body of research. However, very little attention has been given to the notion of domain generalization under natural distribution shifts, where the target domain is unknown. With drastic improvements in the quality and access to generative models, we answer the question: How do generated datasets influence the performance of QA models under natural distribution shifts? We perform experiments on 4 different datasets under varying amounts of distribution shift, and analyze how "in-the-wild" generation can help achieve domain generalization. We take a two-step generation approach, generating both contexts and QA pairs to augment existing datasets. Through our experiments, we demonstrate how augmenting reading comprehension datasets with generated data leads to better robustness towards natural distribution shifts.
summary: Robustness in Natural Language Processing continues to be a pertinent issue, where state of the art models under-perform under naturally shifted distributions. In the context of Question Answering, work on domain adaptation methods continues to be a growing body of research. However, very little attention has been given to the notion of domain generalization under natural distribution shifts, where the target domain is unknown. With drastic improvements in the quality and access to generative models, we answer the question: How do generated datasets influence the performance of QA models under natural distribution shifts? We perform experiments on 4 different datasets under varying amounts of distribution shift, and analyze how "in-the-wild" generation can help achieve domain generalization. We take a two-step generation approach, generating both contexts and QA pairs to augment existing datasets. Through our experiments, we demonstrate how augmenting reading comprehension datasets with generated data leads to better robustness towards natural distribution shifts.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理的鲁棒性仍然是一个相关问题，最先进的模型在自然转移的分布下表现不佳。在问答领域，领域适应方法的研究仍在不断增长。然而，很少有人关注自然分布变化下的域泛化概念，其中目标域是未知的。随着生成模型的质量和访问的大幅改进，我们回答了这个问题：生成的数据集如何影响自然分布变化下 QA 模型的性能？我们在不同分布偏移量下对 4 个不同的数据集进行实验，并分析“野外”生成如何帮助实现领域泛化。我们采用两步生成方法，生成上下文和 QA 对来扩充现有数据集。通过我们的实验，我们演示了如何使用生成的数据增强阅读理解数据集，从而提高对自然分布变化的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用大语言模型生成的数据增强来提升问答模型在自然分布偏移下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有问答模型在自然分布偏移下表现不佳，而领域泛化（目标域未知）的研究相对不足，作者希望探究生成数据对模型在分布偏移下性能的影响。
AI.method: 采用两步生成方法：先生成上下文（contexts），再基于上下文生成问答对（QA pairs），以此增强现有阅读理解数据集，并在4个不同分布偏移程度的数据集上进行实验。
AI.result: 实验表明，使用生成数据增强阅读理解数据集能够使模型在面对自然分布偏移时表现出更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 生成式数据增强可以有效提升问答模型在自然分布偏移下的泛化能力，为领域泛化提供了一种可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Joseph Prince Mathew,Dinesh Karri,James Yang,Kevin Zhu,Yojan Gautam,Kentaro Nojima-Schmunk,Daigo Shishika,Ningshi Yao,Cameron Nowzari
title: Lighter-Than-Air Autonomous Ball Capture and Scoring Robot -- Design, Development, and Deployment
title_zh: 轻于空气的自主接球和得分机器人——设计、开发和部署
abstract: This paper describes the full end-to-end design of our primary scoring agent in an aerial autonomous robotics competition from April 2023. As open-ended robotics competitions become more popular, we wish to begin documenting successful team designs and approaches. The intended audience of this paper is not only any future or potential participant in this particular national Defend The Republic (DTR) competition, but rather anyone thinking about designing their first robot or system to be entered in a competition with clear goals. Future DTR participants can and should either build on the ideas here, or find new alternate strategies that can defeat the most successful design last time. For non-DTR participants but students interested in robotics competitions, identifying the minimum viable system needed to be competitive is still important in helping manage time and prioritizing tasks that are crucial to competition success first.
summary: This paper describes the full end-to-end design of our primary scoring agent in an aerial autonomous robotics competition from April 2023. As open-ended robotics competitions become more popular, we wish to begin documenting successful team designs and approaches. The intended audience of this paper is not only any future or potential participant in this particular national Defend The Republic (DTR) competition, but rather anyone thinking about designing their first robot or system to be entered in a competition with clear goals. Future DTR participants can and should either build on the ideas here, or find new alternate strategies that can defeat the most successful design last time. For non-DTR participants but students interested in robotics competitions, identifying the minimum viable system needed to be competitive is still important in helping manage time and prioritizing tasks that are crucial to competition success first.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了我们在 2023 年 4 月开始的空中自主机器人竞赛中主要评分代理的完整端到端设计。随着开放式机器人竞赛变得越来越流行，我们希望开始记录成功的团队设计和方法。本文的目标受众不仅是任何未来或潜在的全国保卫共和国 (DTR) 竞赛的参与者，而且是任何考虑设计第一个机器人或系统以参加具有明确目标的竞赛的人。未来的 DTR 参与者可以而且应该以这里的想法为基础，或者找到新的替代策略来击败上次最成功的设计。对于非 DTR 参与者但对机器人竞赛感兴趣的学生来说，确定具有竞争力所需的最小可行系统仍然很重要，有助于管理时间并优先确定对竞赛成功至关重要的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了一个用于空中自主机器人竞赛的轻于空气的自主接球和得分机器人的完整端到端设计、开发和部署过程。
AI.motivation: 随着开放式机器人竞赛越来越受欢迎，作者希望记录成功的团队设计方案和方法，帮助未来参赛者（包括DTR竞赛和非DTR竞赛的学生）识别最低可行系统，从而有效管理时间和优先处理关键任务。
AI.method: 采用端到端的设计方法，从系统架构、硬件选型、软件算法到实际部署，完整描述了轻于空气的自主接球与得分机器人的开发过程。
AI.result: 成功设计并部署了一个能够在空中自主接球并得分的机器人系统，并在2023年4月的竞赛中作为主要得分代理取得了成功。
AI.conclusion: 该设计为未来DTR竞赛参与者和对机器人竞赛感兴趣的学生提供了有价值的参考，强调构建具有竞争力的最小可行系统的重要性，并鼓励后续参赛者在此基础上创新或寻找新的策略。

search_text: Lighter-Than-Air Autonomous Ball Capture and Scoring Robot -- Design, Development, and Deployment 轻于空气的自主接球和得分机器人——设计、开发和部署 This paper describes the full end-to-end design of our primary scoring agent in an aerial autonomous robotics competition from April 2023. As open-ended robotics competitions become more popular, we wish to begin documenting successful team designs and approaches. The intended audience of this paper is not only any future or potential participant in this particular national Defend The Republic (DTR) competition, but rather anyone thinking about designing their first robot or system to be entered in a competition with clear goals. Future DTR participants can and should either build on the ideas here, or find new alternate strategies that can defeat the most successful design last time. For non-DTR participants but students interested in robotics competitions, identifying the minimum viable system needed to be competitive is still important in helping manage time and prioritizing tasks that are crucial to competition success first. 本文描述了我们在 2023 年 4 月开始的空中自主机器人竞赛中主要评分代理的完整端到端设计。随着开放式机器人竞赛变得越来越流行，我们希望开始记录成功的团队设计和方法。本文的目标受众不仅是任何未来或潜在的全国保卫共和国 (DTR) 竞赛的参与者，而且是任何考虑设计第一个机器人或系统以参加具有明确目标的竞赛的人。未来的 DTR 参与者可以而且应该以这里的想法为基础，或者找到新的替代策略来击败上次最成功的设计。对于非 DTR 参与者但对机器人竞赛感兴趣的学生来说，确定具有竞争力所需的最小可行系统仍然很重要，有助于管理时间并优先确定对竞赛成功至关重要的任务。 本文描述了一个用于空中自主机器人竞赛的轻于空气的自主接球和得分机器人的完整端到端设计、开发和部署过程。 Joseph Prince Mathew,Dinesh Karri,James Yang,Kevin Zhu,Yojan Gautam,Kentaro Nojima-Schmunk,Daigo Shishika,Ningshi Yao,Cameron Nowzari cs.RO

authors_text: Jian Zhang,Lei Qi,Yinghuan Shi,Yang Gao
title: Exploring Flat Minima for Domain Generalization with Large Learning Rates
title_zh: 探索具有大学习率的域泛化的平坦最小值
abstract: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to generalize to arbitrary unseen domains. A promising approach to improve model generalization in DG is the identification of flat minima. One typical method for this task is SWAD, which involves averaging weights along the training trajectory. However, the success of weight averaging depends on the diversity of weights, which is limited when training with a small learning rate. Instead, we observe that leveraging a large learning rate can simultaneously promote weight diversity and facilitate the identification of flat regions in the loss landscape. However, employing a large learning rate suffers from the convergence problem, which cannot be resolved by simply averaging the training weights. To address this issue, we introduce a training strategy called Lookahead which involves the weight interpolation, instead of average, between fast and slow weights. The fast weight explores the weight space with a large learning rate, which is not converged while the slow weight interpolates with it to ensure the convergence. Besides, weight interpolation also helps identify flat minima by implicitly optimizing the local entropy loss that measures flatness. To further prevent overfitting during training, we propose two variants to regularize the training weight with weighted averaged weight or with accumulated history weight. Taking advantage of this new perspective, our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance on both classification and semantic segmentation domain generalization benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/koncle/DG-with-Large-LR.
summary: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to generalize to arbitrary unseen domains. A promising approach to improve model generalization in DG is the identification of flat minima. One typical method for this task is SWAD, which involves averaging weights along the training trajectory. However, the success of weight averaging depends on the diversity of weights, which is limited when training with a small learning rate. Instead, we observe that leveraging a large learning rate can simultaneously promote weight diversity and facilitate the identification of flat regions in the loss landscape. However, employing a large learning rate suffers from the convergence problem, which cannot be resolved by simply averaging the training weights. To address this issue, we introduce a training strategy called Lookahead which involves the weight interpolation, instead of average, between fast and slow weights. The fast weight explores the weight space with a large learning rate, which is not converged while the slow weight interpolates with it to ensure the convergence. Besides, weight interpolation also helps identify flat minima by implicitly optimizing the local entropy loss that measures flatness. To further prevent overfitting during training, we propose two variants to regularize the training weight with weighted averaged weight or with accumulated history weight. Taking advantage of this new perspective, our methods achieve state-of-the-art performance on both classification and semantic segmentation domain generalization benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/koncle/DG-with-Large-LR.
abstract_zh: 域泛化（DG）旨在泛化到任意未见过的域。提高 DG 模型泛化能力的一个有前途的方法是识别平坦最小值。此任务的一种典型方法是 SWAD，它涉及沿训练轨迹平均权重。然而，权重平均的成功取决于权重的多样性，这在小学习率训练时受到限制。相反，我们观察到利用大的学习率可以同时促进权重多样性并促进损失景观中平坦区域的识别。然而，采用大的学习率会遇到收敛问题，这不能通过简单地平均训练权重来解决。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种称为 Lookahead 的训练策略，它涉及快速权重和慢速权重之间的权重插值，而不是平均值。快速权重探索具有大学习率的权重空间，该权重空间不收敛，而慢速权重对其进行插值以确保收敛。此外，权重插值还通过隐式优化测量平坦度的局部熵损失来帮助识别平坦最小值。为了进一步防止训练过程中的过度拟合，我们提出了两种变体，通过加权平均权重或累积历史权重来规范训练权重。利用这种新的视角，我们的方法在分类和语义分割领域泛化基准上实现了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/koncle/DG-with-Large-LR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用大学习率探索平坦极小值以提升领域泛化性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法SWAD通过小学习率下的权重平均寻找平坦极小值，但权重多样性有限；大学习率虽能促进权重多样性并帮助发现平坦区域，却存在收敛问题，简单的权重平均无法解决。
AI.method: 提出Lookahead训练策略，通过快慢权重之间的插值（而非平均）来平衡探索与收敛：快权重以大学习率探索权重空间，慢权重通过插值确保收敛。同时，权重插值通过隐式优化局部熵损失来帮助识别平坦极小值，并设计了两种正则化变体防止过拟合。
AI.result: 在分类和语义分割的多个领域泛化基准上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 大学习率结合权重插值策略能有效提升领域泛化性能，为利用平坦极小值提供了新视角。

authors_text: James Robert Kubricht,Zhaoyuan Yang,Jianwei Qiu,Peter Henry Tu
title: Grounded Language Acquisition From Object and Action Imagery
title_zh: 从物体和动作意象中习得扎根语言
abstract: Deep learning approaches to natural language processing have made great strides in recent years. While these models produce symbols that convey vast amounts of diverse knowledge, it is unclear how such symbols are grounded in data from the world. In this paper, we explore the development of a private language for visual data representation by training emergent language (EL) encoders/decoders in both i) a traditional referential game environment and ii) a contrastive learning environment utilizing a within-class matching training paradigm. An additional classification layer utilizing neural machine translation and random forest classification was used to transform symbolic representations (sequences of integer symbols) to class labels. These methods were applied in two experiments focusing on object recognition and action recognition. For object recognition, a set of sketches produced by human participants from real imagery was used (Sketchy dataset) and for action recognition, 2D trajectories were generated from 3D motion capture systems (MOVI dataset). In order to interpret the symbols produced for data in each experiment, gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM) methods were used to identify pixel regions indicating semantic features which contribute evidence towards symbols in learned languages. Additionally, a t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) method was used to investigate embeddings learned by CNN feature extractors.
summary: Deep learning approaches to natural language processing have made great strides in recent years. While these models produce symbols that convey vast amounts of diverse knowledge, it is unclear how such symbols are grounded in data from the world. In this paper, we explore the development of a private language for visual data representation by training emergent language (EL) encoders/decoders in both i) a traditional referential game environment and ii) a contrastive learning environment utilizing a within-class matching training paradigm. An additional classification layer utilizing neural machine translation and random forest classification was used to transform symbolic representations (sequences of integer symbols) to class labels. These methods were applied in two experiments focusing on object recognition and action recognition. For object recognition, a set of sketches produced by human participants from real imagery was used (Sketchy dataset) and for action recognition, 2D trajectories were generated from 3D motion capture systems (MOVI dataset). In order to interpret the symbols produced for data in each experiment, gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM) methods were used to identify pixel regions indicating semantic features which contribute evidence towards symbols in learned languages. Additionally, a t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) method was used to investigate embeddings learned by CNN feature extractors.
abstract_zh: 近年来，自然语言处理的深度学习方法取得了长足的进步。虽然这些模型产生的符号传达了大量不同的知识，但尚不清楚这些符号如何基于来自世界的数据。在本文中，我们通过在i）传统参考游戏环境和ii）利用类内匹配训练范例的对比学习环境中训练新兴语言（EL）编码器/解码器来探索用于视觉数据表示的私有语言的开发。利用神经机器翻译和随机森林分类的​​附加分类层用于将符号表示（整数符号序列）转换为类别标签。这些方法应用于两个侧重于物体识别和动作识别的实验。对于对象识别，使用了人类参与者根据真实图像生成的一组草图（Sketchy 数据集）；对于动作识别，使用 3D 运动捕捉系统（MOVI 数据集）生成 2D 轨迹。为了解释每个实验中为数据生成的符号，使用梯度加权类激活映射（Grad-CAM）方法来识别指示语义特征的像素区域，这些语义特征为所学语言中的符号提供了证据。此外，还使用 ​​t 分布随机邻域嵌入 (t-SNE) 方法来研究 CNN 特征提取器学习的嵌入。

AI.tldr: 本文探索通过 emergent language (EL) 编码器/解码器在指称游戏和对比学习环境中进行视觉数据表示的私有语言开发，并应用于物体识别和动作识别任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在自然语言处理中取得了巨大进展，但其生成的符号如何与世界数据建立 grounded 联系尚不明确，因此本文旨在探索如何通过 emergent language 实现视觉数据的符号化表示与接地（grounding）。
AI.method: 采用两种训练环境：传统的指称游戏和基于类内匹配的对比学习环境；使用神经机器翻译和随机森林分类将符号序列转换为类别标签；利用 Grad-CAM 和 t-SNE 方法分析符号与语义特征的对应关系。
AI.result: 在 Sketchy 数据集（物体识别）和 MOVI 数据集（动作识别）上验证了方法的有效性；Grad-CAM 揭示了符号对应的重要像素区域，t-SNE 展示了 CNN 特征提取器学习到的嵌入结构。
AI.conclusion: Emergent language 方法能够从视觉数据中学习到具有 grounding 能力的符号表示，有助于弥合符号系统与世界数据之间的鸿沟。

search_text: Grounded Language Acquisition From Object and Action Imagery 从物体和动作意象中习得扎根语言 Deep learning approaches to natural language processing have made great strides in recent years. While these models produce symbols that convey vast amounts of diverse knowledge, it is unclear how such symbols are grounded in data from the world. In this paper, we explore the development of a private language for visual data representation by training emergent language (EL) encoders/decoders in both i) a traditional referential game environment and ii) a contrastive learning environment utilizing a within-class matching training paradigm. An additional classification layer utilizing neural machine translation and random forest classification was used to transform symbolic representations (sequences of integer symbols) to class labels. These methods were applied in two experiments focusing on object recognition and action recognition. For object recognition, a set of sketches produced by human participants from real imagery was used (Sketchy dataset) and for action recognition, 2D trajectories were generated from 3D motion capture systems (MOVI dataset). In order to interpret the symbols produced for data in each experiment, gradient-weighted class activation mapping (Grad-CAM) methods were used to identify pixel regions indicating semantic features which contribute evidence towards symbols in learned languages. Additionally, a t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) method was used to investigate embeddings learned by CNN feature extractors. 近年来，自然语言处理的深度学习方法取得了长足的进步。虽然这些模型产生的符号传达了大量不同的知识，但尚不清楚这些符号如何基于来自世界的数据。在本文中，我们通过在i）传统参考游戏环境和ii）利用类内匹配训练范例的对比学习环境中训练新兴语言（EL）编码器/解码器来探索用于视觉数据表示的私有语言的开发。利用神经机器翻译和随机森林分类的​​附加分类层用于将符号表示（整数符号序列）转换为类别标签。这些方法应用于两个侧重于物体识别和动作识别的实验。对于对象识别，使用了人类参与者根据真实图像生成的一组草图（Sketchy 数据集）；对于动作识别，使用 3D 运动捕捉系统（MOVI 数据集）生成 2D 轨迹。为了解释每个实验中为数据生成的符号，使用梯度加权类激活映射（Grad-CAM）方法来识别指示语义特征的像素区域，这些语义特征为所学语言中的符号提供了证据。此外，还使用 ​​t 分布随机邻域嵌入 (t-SNE) 方法来研究 CNN 特征提取器学习的嵌入。 本文探索通过 emergent language (EL) 编码器/解码器在指称游戏和对比学习环境中进行视觉数据表示的私有语言开发，并应用于物体识别和动作识别任务。 James Robert Kubricht,Zhaoyuan Yang,Jianwei Qiu,Peter Henry Tu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoyu Zhou,Zhiwei Lin,Xiaojun Shan,Yongtao Wang,Deqing Sun,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: SAMPLING: Scene-adaptive Hierarchical Multiplane Images Representation for Novel View Synthesis from a Single Image
title_zh: 采样：场景自适应分层多平面图像表示，用于从单个图像合成新视图
abstract: Recent novel view synthesis methods obtain promising results for relatively small scenes, e.g., indoor environments and scenes with a few objects, but tend to fail for unbounded outdoor scenes with a single image as input. In this paper, we introduce SAMPLING, a Scene-adaptive Hierarchical Multiplane Images Representation for Novel View Synthesis from a Single Image based on improved multiplane images (MPI). Observing that depth distribution varies significantly for unbounded outdoor scenes, we employ an adaptive-bins strategy for MPI to arrange planes in accordance with each scene image. To represent intricate geometry and multi-scale details, we further introduce a hierarchical refinement branch, which results in high-quality synthesized novel views. Our method demonstrates considerable performance gains in synthesizing large-scale unbounded outdoor scenes using a single image on the KITTI dataset and generalizes well to the unseen Tanks and Temples dataset.The code and models will soon be made available.
summary: Recent novel view synthesis methods obtain promising results for relatively small scenes, e.g., indoor environments and scenes with a few objects, but tend to fail for unbounded outdoor scenes with a single image as input. In this paper, we introduce SAMPLING, a Scene-adaptive Hierarchical Multiplane Images Representation for Novel View Synthesis from a Single Image based on improved multiplane images (MPI). Observing that depth distribution varies significantly for unbounded outdoor scenes, we employ an adaptive-bins strategy for MPI to arrange planes in accordance with each scene image. To represent intricate geometry and multi-scale details, we further introduce a hierarchical refinement branch, which results in high-quality synthesized novel views. Our method demonstrates considerable performance gains in synthesizing large-scale unbounded outdoor scenes using a single image on the KITTI dataset and generalizes well to the unseen Tanks and Temples dataset.The code and models will soon be made available.
abstract_zh: 最近新颖的视图合成方法对于相对较小的场景（例如室内环境和具有少量对象的场景）获得了有希望的结果，但对于以单个图像作为输入的无界室外场景往往会失败。在本文中，我们介绍了 SAMPLING，一种基于改进的多平面图像 (MPI) 的场景自适应分层多平面图像表示，用于从单个图像合成新视图。观察到无界室外场景的深度分布变化很大，我们采用 MPI 的自适应 bins 策略来根据每个场景图像排列平面。为了表示复杂的几何形状和多尺度细节，我们进一步引入了分层细化分支，从而产生高质量的合成新颖视图。我们的方法在使用 KITTI 数据集上的单个图像合成大规模无界户外场景方面展示了相当大的性能提升，并且很好地推广到了看不见的 Tanks 和 Temples 数据集。代码和模型很快就会提供。

AI.tldr: 基于单张图像的大规模无界室外场景新视角合成方法
AI.motivation: 现有新视角合成方法在室内或小场景中效果良好，但在单张图像输入的无界室外场景中表现不佳，因为深度分布变化剧烈，传统MPI方法难以适应。
AI.method: 提出场景自适应分层多平面图像表示(SAMPLING)，采用自适应深度区间策略根据每张场景图像排列平面，并引入分层细化分支以表示复杂几何和多尺度细节。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上合成大规模无界室外场景时性能显著提升，并在未见过的Tanks and Temples数据集上展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的自适应分层MPI方法有效解决了单张图像输入下无界室外场景的新视角合成难题，生成高质量合成视图。

authors_text: Cori Faklaris,Heather Richter Lipford,Sarah Tabassum
title: Preliminary Results from a U.S. Demographic Analysis of SMiSh Susceptibility
title_zh: 美国 SMiSh 易感性人口统计分析的初步结果
comment: 29 pages (18 without references and appendices). 12 figures, 7 tables. A version is in submission to CHI 2024
comments: 29 pages (18 without references and appendices). 12 figures, 7 tables. A version is in submission to CHI 2024
abstract: As adoption of mobile phones has skyrocketed, so have scams involving them. The text method is called SMiShing, (aka SMShing, or smishing) in which a fraudster sends a phishing link via Short Message Service (SMS) text to a phone. However, no data exists on who is most vulnerable to SMiShing. Prior work in phishing (its e-mail cousin) indicates that this is likely to vary by demographic and contextual factors. In our study, we collect this data from N=1007 U.S. adult mobile phone users. Younger people and college students emerge in this sample as the most vulnerable. Participants struggled to correctly identify legitimate messages and were easily misled when they knew they had an account with the faked message entity. Counterintuitively, participants with higher levels of security training and awareness were less correct in rating possible SMiSH. We recommend next steps for researchers, regulators and telecom providers.
summary: As adoption of mobile phones has skyrocketed, so have scams involving them. The text method is called SMiShing, (aka SMShing, or smishing) in which a fraudster sends a phishing link via Short Message Service (SMS) text to a phone. However, no data exists on who is most vulnerable to SMiShing. Prior work in phishing (its e-mail cousin) indicates that this is likely to vary by demographic and contextual factors. In our study, we collect this data from N=1007 U.S. adult mobile phone users. Younger people and college students emerge in this sample as the most vulnerable. Participants struggled to correctly identify legitimate messages and were easily misled when they knew they had an account with the faked message entity. Counterintuitively, participants with higher levels of security training and awareness were less correct in rating possible SMiSH. We recommend next steps for researchers, regulators and telecom providers.
abstract_zh: 随着手机的普及率猛增，涉及手机的诈骗也随之增多。这种文本方法称为 SMiShing（也称为 SMShing 或 smishing），其中欺诈者通过短信服务 (SMS) 文本向手机发送网络钓鱼链接。然而，没有数据表明谁最容易受到短信攻击。先前对网络钓鱼（其电子邮件同类）的研究表明，这可能会因人口统计和背景因素而异。在我们的研究中，我们从 N=1007 名美国成年手机用户中收集了这些数据。在这个样本中，年轻人和大学生是最脆弱的群体。参与者很难正确识别合法消息，并且当他们知道自己拥有伪造消息实体的帐户时很容易被误导。与直觉相反，接受过较高安全培训和意识的参与者对可能的 SMiSH 的评级不太正确。我们建议研究人员、监管机构和电信提供商采取后续行动。

AI.tldr: 本研究对美国成年人进行SMiShing（短信钓鱼）的易感性人口统计学分析，旨在识别最易受攻击的人群。
AI.motivation: 随着手机短信诈骗（SMiShing）激增，尚无数据表明哪些人群最易受骗，因此需要填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 对N=1007名美国成年手机用户进行调查研究，收集他们识别SMiShing消息的能力及相关人口统计学数据。
AI.result: 年轻人和大学生是最易受骗的群体；参与者难以正确识别合法信息，且当知道与伪造消息实体有关联时容易被误导；具有更高安全培训和意识的人反而在识别SMiShing时表现更差。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了SMiShing易感性的人口统计学差异，为研究人员、监管机构和电信运营商提出了下一步建议。

ai_content.result: 年轻人和大学生是最易受骗的群体；参与者难以正确识别合法信息，且当知道与伪造消息实体有关联时容易被误导；具有更高安全培训和意识的人反而在识别SMiShing时表现更差。
ai_content.conclusion: 研究揭示了SMiShing易感性的人口统计学差异，为研究人员、监管机构和电信运营商提出了下一步建议。

search_text: Preliminary Results from a U.S. Demographic Analysis of SMiSh Susceptibility 美国 SMiSh 易感性人口统计分析的初步结果 As adoption of mobile phones has skyrocketed, so have scams involving them. The text method is called SMiShing, (aka SMShing, or smishing) in which a fraudster sends a phishing link via Short Message Service (SMS) text to a phone. However, no data exists on who is most vulnerable to SMiShing. Prior work in phishing (its e-mail cousin) indicates that this is likely to vary by demographic and contextual factors. In our study, we collect this data from N=1007 U.S. adult mobile phone users. Younger people and college students emerge in this sample as the most vulnerable. Participants struggled to correctly identify legitimate messages and were easily misled when they knew they had an account with the faked message entity. Counterintuitively, participants with higher levels of security training and awareness were less correct in rating possible SMiSH. We recommend next steps for researchers, regulators and telecom providers. 随着手机的普及率猛增，涉及手机的诈骗也随之增多。这种文本方法称为 SMiShing（也称为 SMShing 或 smishing），其中欺诈者通过短信服务 (SMS) 文本向手机发送网络钓鱼链接。然而，没有数据表明谁最容易受到短信攻击。先前对网络钓鱼（其电子邮件同类）的研究表明，这可能会因人口统计和背景因素而异。在我们的研究中，我们从 N=1007 名美国成年手机用户中收集了这些数据。在这个样本中，年轻人和大学生是最脆弱的群体。参与者很难正确识别合法消息，并且当他们知道自己拥有伪造消息实体的帐户时很容易被误导。与直觉相反，接受过较高安全培训和意识的参与者对可能的 SMiSH 的评级不太正确。我们建议研究人员、监管机构和电信提供商采取后续行动。 本研究对美国成年人进行SMiShing（短信钓鱼）的易感性人口统计学分析，旨在识别最易受攻击的人群。 Cori Faklaris,Heather Richter Lipford,Sarah Tabassum cs.HC,cs.CR,cs.CY,cs.SI

authors_text: Amir Abboud,Karl Bringmann,Nick Fischer,Marvin Künnemann
title: The Time Complexity of Fully Sparse Matrix Multiplication
title_zh: 全稀疏矩阵乘法的时间复杂度
abstract: What is the time complexity of matrix multiplication of sparse integer matrices with $m_{in}$ nonzeros in the input and $m_{out}$ nonzeros in the output? This paper provides improved upper bounds for this question for almost any choice of $m_{in}$ vs. $m_{out}$, and provides evidence that these new bounds might be optimal up to further progress on fast matrix multiplication. Our main contribution is a new algorithm that reduces sparse matrix multiplication to dense (but smaller) rectangular matrix multiplication. Our running time thus depends on the optimal exponent $ω(a,b,c)$ of multiplying dense $n^a\times n^b$ by $n^b\times n^c$ matrices. We discover that when $m_{out}=Θ(m_{in}^r)$ the time complexity of sparse matrix multiplication is $O(m_{in}^{σ+ε})$, for all $ε> 0$, where $σ$ is the solution to the equation $ω(σ-1,2-σ,1+r-σ)=σ$. No matter what $ω(\cdot,\cdot,\cdot)$ turns out to be, and for all $r\in(0,2)$, the new bound beats the state of the art, and we provide evidence that it is optimal based on the complexity of the all-edge triangle problem. In particular, in terms of the input plus output size $m = m_{in} + m_{out}$ our algorithm runs in time $O(m^{1.3459})$. Even for Boolean matrices, this improves over the previous $m^{\frac{2ω}{ω+1}+ε}=O(m^{1.4071})$ bound [Amossen, Pagh; 2009], which was a natural barrier since it coincides with the longstanding bound of all-edge triangle in sparse graphs [Alon, Yuster, Zwick; 1994]. We find it interesting that matrix multiplication can be solved faster than triangle detection in this natural setting. In fact, we establish an equivalence to a special case of the all-edge triangle problem.

abstract_zh: 输入中包含 $m_{in}$ 个非零值且输出中包含 $m_{out}$ 个非零值的稀疏整数矩阵的矩阵乘法的时间复杂度是多少？本文为这个问题提供了针对 $m_{in}$ 与 $m_{out}$ 的几乎任何选择的改进上限，并提供了证据表明这些新界限可能是最佳的，以进一步推动快速矩阵乘法。我们的主要贡献是一种新算法，将稀疏矩阵乘法减少为密集（但更小）矩形矩阵乘法。因此，我们的运行时间取决于密集 $n^a\times n^b$ 矩阵乘以 $n^b\times n^c$ 矩阵的最佳指数 $ω(a,b,c)$。我们发现，当 $m_{out}=θ(m_{in}^r)$ 时，对于所有 $ε> 0$，稀疏矩阵乘法的时间复杂度为 $O(m_{in}^{σ+ε})$，其中 $σ$ 是方程 $ω(σ-1,2-σ,1+r-σ)=σ$ 的解。无论 $ω(\cdot,\cdot,\cdot)$ 结果是什么，对于所有 $r\in(0,2)$ 来说，新的界限都击败了现有技术，并且我们提供的证据表明，基于全边三角形问题的复杂性，它是最优的。特别是，就输入加输出大小 $m = m_{in} + m_{out}$ 而言，我们的算法运行时间为 $O(m^{1.3459})$。即使对于布尔矩阵，这也比之前的 $m^{\frac{2ω}{ω+1}+ε}=O(m^{1.4071})$ 界限有所改进 [Amossen, Pagh; 2009]，这是一个天然屏障，因为它与稀疏图中全边三角形的长期界限重合[Alon，Yuster，Zwick； 1994]。我们发现有趣的是，在这种自然环境中，矩阵乘法的求解速度比三角形检测更快。事实上，我们建立了全边三角形问题的特殊情况的等价。

AI.tldr: 研究稀疏整数矩阵乘法的时间复杂度，即在给定输入非零元数 $m_{in}$ 和输出非零元数 $m_{out}$ 时，矩阵乘法的最优时间上界。
AI.motivation: 改进现有稀疏矩阵乘法的时间复杂度上界，突破长期以来基于全边三角形问题复杂度的自然屏障（$O(m^{1.4071})$），并探索该问题与快速矩阵乘法及三角形检测问题之间的深层联系。
AI.method: 提出一种新的算法，将稀疏矩阵乘法归约到规模更小的稠密（矩形）矩阵乘法，其运行时间依赖于稠密矩阵乘法的优化指数 $\omega(a,b,c)$。
AI.result: 对于所有 $r \in (0,2)$，时间复杂度为 $O(m_{in}^{\sigma+\epsilon})$，其中 $\sigma$ 是方程 $\omega(\sigma-1,2-\sigma,1+r-\sigma)=\sigma$ 的解；在输入加输出总规模 $m$ 下，运行时间为 $O(m^{1.3459})$，优于此前 $O(m^{1.4071})$ 的最优结果。
AI.conclusion: 新的稀疏矩阵乘法算法不仅优于现有最优上界，而且在该问题的自然设定下比三角形检测问题解决得更快，同时建立了与全边三角形问题特例的等价性，表明该上界可能是最优的。

authors_text: Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Per-Arne Andersen,Lei Jiao,Xuan Zhang,Christian Blakely,Tor Tveit
title: Learning Minimalistic Tsetlin Machine Clauses with Markov Boundary-Guided Pruning
title_zh: 使用马尔可夫边界引导剪枝学习简约 Tsetlin 机器子句
abstract: A set of variables is the Markov blanket of a random variable if it contains all the information needed for predicting the variable. If the blanket cannot be reduced without losing useful information, it is called a Markov boundary. Identifying the Markov boundary of a random variable is advantageous because all variables outside the boundary are superfluous. Hence, the Markov boundary provides an optimal feature set. However, learning the Markov boundary from data is challenging for two reasons. If one or more variables are removed from the Markov boundary, variables outside the boundary may start providing information. Conversely, variables within the boundary may stop providing information. The true role of each candidate variable is only manifesting when the Markov boundary has been identified. In this paper, we propose a new Tsetlin Machine (TM) feedback scheme that supplements Type I and Type II feedback. The scheme introduces a novel Finite State Automaton - a Context-Specific Independence Automaton. The automaton learns which features are outside the Markov boundary of the target, allowing them to be pruned from the TM during learning. We investigate the new scheme empirically, showing how it is capable of exploiting context-specific independence to find Markov boundaries. Further, we provide a theoretical analysis of convergence. Our approach thus connects the field of Bayesian networks (BN) with TMs, potentially opening up for synergies when it comes to inference and learning, including TM-produced Bayesian knowledge bases and TM-based Bayesian inference.

We investigate the new scheme empirically, showing how it is capable of exploiting context-specific independence to find Markov boundaries. Further, we provide a theoretical analysis of convergence. Our approach thus connects the field of Bayesian networks (BN) with TMs, potentially opening up for synergies when it comes to inference and learning, including TM-produced Bayesian knowledge bases and TM-based Bayesian inference.
abstract_zh: 如果一组变量包含预测变量所需的所有信息，则它是随机变量的马尔可夫毯。如果不能在不丢失有用信息的情况下减少毯子，则称为马尔可夫边界。识别随机变量的马尔可夫边界是有利的，因为边界之外的所有变量都是多余的。因此，马尔可夫边界提供了最佳特征集。然而，从数据中学习马尔可夫边界具有挑战性，原因有两个。如果从马尔可夫边界中删除一个或多个变量，边界外的变量可能会开始提供信息。相反，边界内的变量可能会停止提供信息。每个候选变量的真正作用只有在马尔可夫边界确定后才会显现出来。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 Tsetlin Machine (TM) 反馈方案，该方案补充了 I 型和 II 型反馈。该方案引入了一种新颖的有限状态自动机 - 上下文特定的独立自动机。自动机学习哪些特征在目标的马尔可夫边界之外，从而允许在学习过程中从 TM 中修剪它们。我们根据经验研究了新方案，展示了它如何能够利用特定于上下文的独立性来找到马尔可夫边界。此外，我们提供了收敛的理论分析。因此，我们的方法将贝叶斯网络 (BN) 领域与 TM 联系起来，在推理和学习方面可能会产生协同作用，包括 TM 生成的贝叶斯知识库和基于 TM 的贝叶斯推理。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于马尔可夫边界引导剪枝的Tsetlin机器学习框架，用于学习最小化子句结构。
AI.motivation: 马尔可夫边界能够识别最优特征集，但现有方法难以从数据中准确学习该边界，且Tsetlin机器在特征选择方面存在不足。
AI.method: 在Tsetlin机器标准Type I和Type II反馈基础上，引入一种新的上下文特定独立性自动机（Context-Specific Independence Automaton），通过学习特征是否位于目标变量的马尔可夫边界之外，实现学习过程中的特征剪枝。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效利用上下文特定独立性发现马尔可夫边界，并提供了理论收敛性分析。
AI.conclusion: 将贝叶斯网络与Tsetlin机器相连接，为贝叶斯推理与学习、Tsetlin机器生成的贝叶斯知识库等方向开辟了新的协同可能。

search_text: Learning Minimalistic Tsetlin Machine Clauses with Markov Boundary-Guided Pruning 使用马尔可夫边界引导剪枝学习简约 Tsetlin 机器子句 A set of variables is the Markov blanket of a random variable if it contains all the information needed for predicting the variable. If the blanket cannot be reduced without losing useful information, it is called a Markov boundary. Identifying the Markov boundary of a random variable is advantageous because all variables outside the boundary are superfluous. Hence, the Markov boundary provides an optimal feature set. However, learning the Markov boundary from data is challenging for two reasons. If one or more variables are removed from the Markov boundary, variables outside the boundary may start providing information. Conversely, variables within the boundary may stop providing information. The true role of each candidate variable is only manifesting when the Markov boundary has been identified. In this paper, we propose a new Tsetlin Machine (TM) feedback scheme that supplements Type I and Type II feedback. The scheme introduces a novel Finite State Automaton - a Context-Specific Independence Automaton. The automaton learns which features are outside the Markov boundary of the target, allowing them to be pruned from the TM during learning. We investigate the new scheme empirically, showing how it is capable of exploiting context-specific independence to find Markov boundaries. Further, we provide a theoretical analysis of convergence. Our approach thus connects the field of Bayesian networks (BN) with TMs, potentially opening up for synergies when it comes to inference and learning, including TM-produced Bayesian knowledge bases and TM-based Bayesian inference. 如果一组变量包含预测变量所需的所有信息，则它是随机变量的马尔可夫毯。如果不能在不丢失有用信息的情况下减少毯子，则称为马尔可夫边界。识别随机变量的马尔可夫边界是有利的，因为边界之外的所有变量都是多余的。因此，马尔可夫边界提供了最佳特征集。然而，从数据中学习马尔可夫边界具有挑战性，原因有两个。如果从马尔可夫边界中删除一个或多个变量，边界外的变量可能会开始提供信息。相反，边界内的变量可能会停止提供信息。每个候选变量的真正作用只有在马尔可夫边界确定后才会显现出来。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 Tsetlin Machine (TM) 反馈方案，该方案补充了 I 型和 II 型反馈。该方案引入了一种新颖的有限状态自动机 - 上下文特定的独立自动机。自动机学习哪些特征在目标的马尔可夫边界之外，从而允许在学习过程中从 TM 中修剪它们。我们根据经验研究了新方案，展示了它如何能够利用特定于上下文的独立性来找到马尔可夫边界。此外，我们提供了收敛的理论分析。因此，我们的方法将贝叶斯网络 (BN) 领域与 TM 联系起来，在推理和学习方面可能会产生协同作用，包括 TM 生成的贝叶斯知识库和基于 TM 的贝叶斯推理。 提出一种基于马尔可夫边界引导剪枝的Tsetlin机器学习框架，用于学习最小化子句结构。 Ole-Christoffer Granmo,Per-Arne Andersen,Lei Jiao,Xuan Zhang,Christian Blakely,Tor Tveit cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Maria Priisalu
title: Semantic and Articulated Pedestrian Sensing Onboard a Moving Vehicle
title_zh: 移动车辆上的语义和铰接式行人感应
abstract: It is difficult to perform 3D reconstruction from on-vehicle gathered video due to the large forward motion of the vehicle. Even object detection and human sensing models perform significantly worse on onboard videos when compared to standard benchmarks because objects often appear far away from the camera compared to the standard object detection benchmarks, image quality is often decreased by motion blur and occlusions occur often. This has led to the popularisation of traffic data-specific benchmarks. Recently Light Detection And Ranging (LiDAR) sensors have become popular to directly estimate depths without the need to perform 3D reconstructions. However, LiDAR-based methods still lack in articulated human detection at a distance when compared to image-based methods. We hypothesize that benchmarks targeted at articulated human sensing from LiDAR data could bring about increased research in human sensing and prediction in traffic and could lead to improved traffic safety for pedestrians.
summary: It is difficult to perform 3D reconstruction from on-vehicle gathered video due to the large forward motion of the vehicle. Even object detection and human sensing models perform significantly worse on onboard videos when compared to standard benchmarks because objects often appear far away from the camera compared to the standard object detection benchmarks, image quality is often decreased by motion blur and occlusions occur often. This has led to the popularisation of traffic data-specific benchmarks. Recently Light Detection And Ranging (LiDAR) sensors have become popular to directly estimate depths without the need to perform 3D reconstructions. However, LiDAR-based methods still lack in articulated human detection at a distance when compared to image-based methods. We hypothesize that benchmarks targeted at articulated human sensing from LiDAR data could bring about increased research in human sensing and prediction in traffic and could lead to improved traffic safety for pedestrians.
abstract_zh: 由于车辆向前运动较大，很难根据车载采集视频进行 3D 重建。与标准基准相比，即使物体检测和人体感应模型在机载视频上的表现也明显较差，因为与标准物体检测基准相比，物体通常看起来距离相机很远，图像质量通常会因运动模糊而降低，并且经常发生遮挡。这导致了交通数据特定基准的普及。最近，光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 传感器已变得流行，可以直接估计深度，而无需执行 3D 重建。然而，与基于图像的方法相比，基于激光雷达的方法仍然缺乏远距离的关节式人体检测。我们假设，针对 LiDAR 数据中的铰接式人体感应的基准可以增加对人体感应和交通预测的研究，并可能改善行人的交通安全。

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了在移动车辆上对行人进行语义和关节感知的挑战，特别是利用LiDAR数据改善远距离行人检测。
AI.motivation: 由于车辆前向运动大、图像质量差（运动模糊、遮挡）以及物体距离远，现有基于图像的方法表现不佳，而LiDAR方法在远距离关节人体检测方面仍落后于图像方法，因此需要针对LiDAR数据的行人感知基准以提升交通安全。
AI.method: 论文提出假设：建立针对LiDAR数据的关节人体感知基准，能够促进交通场景中行人感知与预测的研究。
AI.result: LiDAR-based methods still lack in articulated human detection at a distance when compared to image-based methods.
AI.conclusion: 针对LiDAR数据的关节人体感知基准有望推动相关研究并改善行人交通安全。

authors_text: Sergio Romero-Tapiador,Ruben Tolosana,Aythami Morales,Isabel Espinosa-Salinas,Gala Freixer,Julian Fierrez,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Enrique Carrillo de Santa Pau,Ana Ramírez de Molina,Javier Ortega-Garcia
title: AI4Food-NutritionFW: A Novel Framework for the Automatic Synthesis and Analysis of Eating Behaviours
title_zh: AI4Food-NutritionFW：饮食行为自动合成和分析的新框架
abstract: Nowadays millions of images are shared on social media and web platforms. In particular, many of them are food images taken from a smartphone over time, providing information related to the individual's diet. On the other hand, eating behaviours are directly related to some of the most prevalent diseases in the world. Exploiting recent advances in image processing and Artificial Intelligence (AI), this scenario represents an excellent opportunity to: i) create new methods that analyse the individuals' health from what they eat, and ii) develop personalised recommendations to improve nutrition and diet under specific circumstances (e.g., obesity or COVID). Having tunable tools for creating food image datasets that facilitate research in both lines is very much needed. This paper proposes AI4Food-NutritionFW, a framework for the creation of food image datasets according to configurable eating behaviours. AI4Food-NutritionFW simulates a user-friendly and widespread scenario where images are taken using a smartphone. In addition to the framework, we also provide and describe a unique food image dataset that includes 4,800 different weekly eating behaviours from 15 different profiles and 1,200 subjects. Specifically, we consider profiles that comply with actual lifestyles from healthy eating behaviours (according to established knowledge), variable profiles (e.g., eating out, holidays), to unhealthy ones (e.g., excess of fast food or sweets). Finally, we automatically evaluate a healthy index of the subject's eating behaviours using multidimensional metrics based on guidelines for healthy diets proposed by international organisations, achieving promising results (99.53% and 99.60% accuracy and sensitivity, respectively). We also release to the research community a software implementation of our proposed AI4Food-NutritionFW and the mentioned food image dataset created with it.
summary: Nowadays millions of images are shared on social media and web platforms. In particular, many of them are food images taken from a smartphone over time, providing information related to the individual's diet. On the other hand, eating behaviours are directly related to some of the most prevalent diseases in the world. Exploiting recent advances in image processing and Artificial Intelligence (AI), this scenario represents an excellent opportunity to: i) create new methods that analyse the individuals' health from what they eat, and ii) develop personalised recommendations to improve nutrition and diet under specific circumstances (e.g., obesity or COVID). Having tunable tools for creating food image datasets that facilitate research in both lines is very much needed. This paper proposes AI4Food-NutritionFW, a framework for the creation of food image datasets according to configurable eating behaviours. AI4Food-NutritionFW simulates a user-friendly and widespread scenario where images are taken using a smartphone. In addition to the framework, we also provide and describe a unique food image dataset that includes 4,800 different weekly eating behaviours from 15 different profiles and 1,200 subjects. Specifically, we consider profiles that comply with actual lifestyles from healthy eating behaviours (according to established knowledge), variable profiles (e.g., eating out, holidays), to unhealthy ones (e.g., excess of fast food or sweets). Finally, we automatically evaluate a healthy index of the subject's eating behaviours using multidimensional metrics based on guidelines for healthy diets proposed by international organisations, achieving promising results (99.53% and 99.60% accuracy and sensitivity, respectively). We also release to the research community a software implementation of our proposed AI4Food-NutritionFW and the mentioned food image dataset created with it.
abstract_zh: 如今，社交媒体和网络平台上分享了数百万张图像。特别是，其中许多是智能手机随着时间的推移拍摄的食物图像，提供与个人饮食相关的信息。另一方面，饮食行为与世界上一些最流行的疾病直接相关。利用图像处理和人工智能 (AI) 方面的最新进展，该场景提供了一个绝佳的机会：i) 创建新方法来分析个人的饮食健康状况，ii) 制定个性化建议，以改善特定情况下（例如肥胖或新冠疫情）下的营养和饮食。非常需要拥有可调整的工具来创建食品图像数据集，以促进这两个方面的研究。本文提出了 AI4Food-NutritionFW，一个根据可配置的饮食行为创建食物图像数据集的框架。 AI4Food-NutritionFW 模拟了一种用户友好且广泛使用的场景，即使用智能手机拍摄图像。除了该框架之外，我们还提供并描述了一个独特的食物图像数据集，其中包括来自 15 个不同档案和 1,200 名受试者的 4,800 种不同的每周饮食行为。具体来说，我们考虑符合实际生活方式的配置文件，从健康饮食行为（根据既定知识）、可变配置文件（例如外出就餐、假期）到不健康的饮食行为（例如过量快餐或甜食）。最后，我们根据国际组织提出的健康饮食指南，使用多维指标自动评估受试者饮食行为的健康指数，取得了可喜的结果（准确度和灵敏度分别为 99.53% 和 99.60%）。我们还向研究社区发布了我们提出的 AI4Food-NutritionFW 的软件实现以及用它创建的上述食物图像数据集。

AI.tldr: 提出AI4Food-NutritionFW框架，用于根据可配置的饮食行为自动合成和分析食物图像数据集，以支持饮食健康评估研究。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体和网络平台上大量食物图像蕴含个体饮食信息，而饮食行为与多种常见疾病密切相关。现有研究缺乏可调工具来创建食物图像数据集以支持饮食健康分析和个性化推荐。
AI.method: 开发AI4Food-NutritionFW框架，模拟智能手机拍照场景，支持可配置的饮食行为参数；创建包含15种不同饮食档案、4,800种周饮食行为、1,200名受试者的食物图像数据集；采用基于国际组织健康饮食指南的多维指标自动评估受试者的健康指数。
AI.result: 在饮食健康指数自动评估中，准确率和灵敏度分别达到99.53%和99.60%，表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可有效生成食物图像数据集并自动评估饮食健康指数，有助于饮食行为分析和个性化营养推荐研究，同时将实现和数据集开源供社区使用。

search_text: AI4Food-NutritionFW: A Novel Framework for the Automatic Synthesis and Analysis of Eating Behaviours AI4Food-NutritionFW：饮食行为自动合成和分析的新框架 Nowadays millions of images are shared on social media and web platforms. In particular, many of them are food images taken from a smartphone over time, providing information related to the individual's diet. On the other hand, eating behaviours are directly related to some of the most prevalent diseases in the world. Exploiting recent advances in image processing and Artificial Intelligence (AI), this scenario represents an excellent opportunity to: i) create new methods that analyse the individuals' health from what they eat, and ii) develop personalised recommendations to improve nutrition and diet under specific circumstances (e.g., obesity or COVID). Having tunable tools for creating food image datasets that facilitate research in both lines is very much needed. This paper proposes AI4Food-NutritionFW, a framework for the creation of food image datasets according to configurable eating behaviours. AI4Food-NutritionFW simulates a user-friendly and widespread scenario where images are taken using a smartphone. In addition to the framework, we also provide and describe a unique food image dataset that includes 4,800 different weekly eating behaviours from 15 different profiles and 1,200 subjects. Specifically, we consider profiles that comply with actual lifestyles from healthy eating behaviours (according to established knowledge), variable profiles (e.g., eating out, holidays), to unhealthy ones (e.g., excess of fast food or sweets). Finally, we automatically evaluate a healthy index of the subject's eating behaviours using multidimensional metrics based on guidelines for healthy diets proposed by international organisations, achieving promising results (99.53% and 99.60% accuracy and sensitivity, respectively). We also release to the research community a software implementation of our proposed AI4Food-NutritionFW and the mentioned food image dataset created with it. 如今，社交媒体和网络平台上分享了数百万张图像。特别是，其中许多是智能手机随着时间的推移拍摄的食物图像，提供与个人饮食相关的信息。另一方面，饮食行为与世界上一些最流行的疾病直接相关。利用图像处理和人工智能 (AI) 方面的最新进展，该场景提供了一个绝佳的机会：i) 创建新方法来分析个人的饮食健康状况，ii) 制定个性化建议，以改善特定情况下（例如肥胖或新冠疫情）下的营养和饮食。非常需要拥有可调整的工具来创建食品图像数据集，以促进这两个方面的研究。本文提出了 AI4Food-NutritionFW，一个根据可配置的饮食行为创建食物图像数据集的框架。 AI4Food-NutritionFW 模拟了一种用户友好且广泛使用的场景，即使用智能手机拍摄图像。除了该框架之外，我们还提供并描述了一个独特的食物图像数据集，其中包括来自 15 个不同档案和 1,200 名受试者的 4,800 种不同的每周饮食行为。具体来说，我们考虑符合实际生活方式的配置文件，从健康饮食行为（根据既定知识）、可变配置文件（例如外出就餐、假期）到不健康的饮食行为（例如过量快餐或甜食）。最后，我们根据国际组织提出的健康饮食指南，使用多维指标自动评估受试者饮食行为的健康指数，取得了可喜的结果（准确度和灵敏度分别为 99.53% 和 99.60%）。我们还向研究社区发布了我们提出的 AI4Food-NutritionFW 的软件实现以及用它创建的上述食物图像数据集。 提出AI4Food-NutritionFW框架，用于根据可配置的饮食行为自动合成和分析食物图像数据集，以支持饮食健康评估研究。 Sergio Romero-Tapiador,Ruben Tolosana,Aythami Morales,Isabel Espinosa-Salinas,Gala Freixer,Julian Fierrez,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Enrique Carrillo de Santa Pau,Ana Ramírez de Molina,Javier Ortega-Garcia cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Gang Fu,Qing Zhang,Lei Zhu,Chunxia Xiao,Ping Li
title: Towards High-Quality Specular Highlight Removal by Leveraging Large-Scale Synthetic Data
title_zh: 利用大规模合成数据实现高质量镜面高光去除
abstract: This paper aims to remove specular highlights from a single object-level image. Although previous methods have made some progresses, their performance remains somewhat limited, particularly for real images with complex specular highlights. To this end, we propose a three-stage network to address them. Specifically, given an input image, we first decompose it into the albedo, shading, and specular residue components to estimate a coarse specular-free image. Then, we further refine the coarse result to alleviate its visual artifacts such as color distortion. Finally, we adjust the tone of the refined result to match that of the input as closely as possible. In addition, to facilitate network training and quantitative evaluation, we present a large-scale synthetic dataset of object-level images, covering diverse objects and illumination conditions. Extensive experiments illustrate that our network is able to generalize well to unseen real object-level images, and even produce good results for scene-level images with multiple background objects and complex lighting.
summary: This paper aims to remove specular highlights from a single object-level image. Although previous methods have made some progresses, their performance remains somewhat limited, particularly for real images with complex specular highlights. To this end, we propose a three-stage network to address them. Specifically, given an input image, we first decompose it into the albedo, shading, and specular residue components to estimate a coarse specular-free image. Then, we further refine the coarse result to alleviate its visual artifacts such as color distortion. Finally, we adjust the tone of the refined result to match that of the input as closely as possible. In addition, to facilitate network training and quantitative evaluation, we present a large-scale synthetic dataset of object-level images, covering diverse objects and illumination conditions. Extensive experiments illustrate that our network is able to generalize well to unseen real object-level images, and even produce good results for scene-level images with multiple background objects and complex lighting.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在从单个对象级图像中去除镜面高光。尽管以前的方法已经取得了一些进展，但它们的性能仍然有限，特别是对于具有复杂镜面高光的真实图像。为此，我们提出了一个三阶段网络来解决这些问题。具体来说，给定输入图像，我们首先将其分解为反照率、阴影和镜面残留分量，以估计粗略的无镜面图像。然后，我们进一步细化粗略结果，以减轻其视觉伪像，例如颜色失真。最后，我们调整精炼结果的语气，使其尽可能匹配输入的语气。此外，为了促进网络训练和定量评估，我们提出了对象级图像的大规模合成数据集，涵盖不同的对象和照明条件。大量的实验表明，我们的网络能够很好地泛化到未见过的真实对象级图像，甚至对于具有多个背景对象和复杂光照的场景级图像产生良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从单张物体级别图像中去除高光反射，生成高质量的无高光图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理真实图像中的复杂高光时性能有限，尤其是在复杂光照和场景下效果不佳，因此需要更鲁棒的高光去除方法。
AI.method: 提出一个三阶段网络：第一阶段将输入图像分解为反照率、 shading 和高光残差分量，估计粗略无高光图像；第二阶段细化粗略结果以减少颜色失真等伪影；第三阶段调整色调使其与输入图像尽可能匹配。同时构建了一个大规模合成数据集用于训练和评估。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该网络能够很好地泛化到未见过的真实物体级图像，甚至对包含多个背景物体和复杂光照的场景级图像也能产生良好结果。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的三阶段网络结合大规模合成数据，能够有效去除单张图像中的高光，显著优于现有方法，并具有良好的泛化能力。

authors_text: Ilya Auslender,Lorenzo Pavesi
title: Reservoir Computing Model For Multi-Electrode Electrophysiological Data Analysis
title_zh: 用于多电极电生理数据分析的储层计算模型
comment: ef:2023 IEEE Conference on Computational Intelligence in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology (CIBCB), Eindhoven, Netherlands, 2023
comments: ef:2023 IEEE Conference on Computational Intelligence in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology (CIBCB), Eindhoven, Netherlands, 2023
abstract: In this paper we present a computational model which decodes the spatio-temporal data from electro-physiological measurements of neuronal networks and reconstructs the network structure on a macroscopic domain, representing the connectivity between neuronal units. The model is based on reservoir computing network (RCN) approach, where experimental data is used as training and validation data. Consequently, the model can be used to study the functionality of different neuronal cultures and simulate the network response to external stimuli.
summary: In this paper we present a computational model which decodes the spatio-temporal data from electro-physiological measurements of neuronal networks and reconstructs the network structure on a macroscopic domain, representing the connectivity between neuronal units. The model is based on reservoir computing network (RCN) approach, where experimental data is used as training and validation data. Consequently, the model can be used to study the functionality of different neuronal cultures and simulate the network response to external stimuli.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种计算模型，该模型从神经元网络的电生理测量中解码时空数据，并在宏观域上重建网络结构，代表神经元单元之间的连接性。该模型基于油藏计算网络（RCN）方法，其中实验数据用作训练和验证数据。因此，该模型可用于研究不同神经元培养物的功能并模拟网络对外部刺激的反应。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于储层计算网络（RCN）的模型，用于解码多电极电生理数据的时空信息，并重构神经元网络的宏观连接结构。
AI.motivation: 为了从电生理测量数据中解码神经网络的时空动态，并重建神经元单元之间的宏观连接性，从而研究不同神经元培养物的功能并模拟网络对外部刺激的响应。
AI.method: 采用储层计算网络（RCN）方法，将实验数据作为训练和验证数据，构建能够解码时空电生理数据并重构网络结构的计算模型。
AI.result: 该模型能够利用实验数据成功训练和验证，可用于研究不同神经元培养物的功能特性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型不仅能够解码多电极电生理数据的时空信息并重构网络连接结构，还可用于模拟神经网络对外部刺激的响应，为研究神经元网络功能提供了有效工具。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种基于储层计算网络（RCN）的模型，用于解码多电极电生理数据的时空信息，并重构神经元网络的宏观连接结构。

ai_content.result: 该模型能够利用实验数据成功训练和验证，可用于研究不同神经元培养物的功能特性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该模型不仅能够解码多电极电生理数据的时空信息并重构网络连接结构，还可用于模拟神经网络对外部刺激的响应，为研究神经元网络功能提供了有效工具。

search_text: Reservoir Computing Model For Multi-Electrode Electrophysiological Data Analysis 用于多电极电生理数据分析的储层计算模型 In this paper we present a computational model which decodes the spatio-temporal data from electro-physiological measurements of neuronal networks and reconstructs the network structure on a macroscopic domain, representing the connectivity between neuronal units. The model is based on reservoir computing network (RCN) approach, where experimental data is used as training and validation data. Consequently, the model can be used to study the functionality of different neuronal cultures and simulate the network response to external stimuli. 在本文中，我们提出了一种计算模型，该模型从神经元网络的电生理测量中解码时空数据，并在宏观域上重建网络结构，代表神经元单元之间的连接性。该模型基于油藏计算网络（RCN）方法，其中实验数据用作训练和验证数据。因此，该模型可用于研究不同神经元培养物的功能并模拟网络对外部刺激的反应。 提出一种基于储层计算网络（RCN）的模型，用于解码多电极电生理数据的时空信息，并重构神经元网络的宏观连接结构。 Ilya Auslender,Lorenzo Pavesi q-bio.QM,cs.ET,physics.bio-ph,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Hoàng-Ân Lê,Minh-Tan Pham
title: Self-Training and Multi-Task Learning for Limited Data: Evaluation Study on Object Detection
title_zh: 有限数据的自训练和多任务学习：目标检测的评估研究
comment: Accepted for International Conference in Computer Vision workshop (ICCVW) 2023
comments: Accepted for International Conference in Computer Vision workshop (ICCVW) 2023
abstract: Self-training allows a network to learn from the predictions of a more complicated model, thus often requires well-trained teacher models and mixture of teacher-student data while multi-task learning jointly optimizes different targets to learn salient interrelationship and requires multi-task annotations for each training example. These frameworks, despite being particularly data demanding have potentials for data exploitation if such assumptions can be relaxed. In this paper, we compare self-training object detection under the deficiency of teacher training data where students are trained on unseen examples by the teacher, and multi-task learning with partially annotated data, i.e. single-task annotation per training example. Both scenarios have their own limitation but potentially helpful with limited annotated data. Experimental results show the improvement of performance when using a weak teacher with unseen data for training a multi-task student. Despite the limited setup we believe the experimental results show the potential of multi-task knowledge distillation and self-training, which could be beneficial for future study. Source code is at https://lhoangan.github.io/multas.
summary: Self-training allows a network to learn from the predictions of a more complicated model, thus often requires well-trained teacher models and mixture of teacher-student data while multi-task learning jointly optimizes different targets to learn salient interrelationship and requires multi-task annotations for each training example. These frameworks, despite being particularly data demanding have potentials for data exploitation if such assumptions can be relaxed. In this paper, we compare self-training object detection under the deficiency of teacher training data where students are trained on unseen examples by the teacher, and multi-task learning with partially annotated data, i.e. single-task annotation per training example. Both scenarios have their own limitation but potentially helpful with limited annotated data. Experimental results show the improvement of performance when using a weak teacher with unseen data for training a multi-task student. Despite the limited setup we believe the experimental results show the potential of multi-task knowledge distillation and self-training, which could be beneficial for future study. Source code is at https://lhoangan.github.io/multas.
abstract_zh: 自训练允许网络从更复杂模型的预测中学习，因此通常需要训练有素的教师模型和师生数据的混合，而多任务学习联合优化不同的目标以学习显着的相互关系，并需要为每个训练示例进行多任务注释。尽管这些框架对数据的要求特别高，但如果可以放宽这些假设，则它们具有数据利用的潜力。在本文中，我们比较了教师训练数据不足的情况下的自训练目标检测（学生由教师根据未见过的示例进行训练）和部分注释数据的多任务学习（即每个训练示例进行单任务注释）。这两种场景都有其自身的局限性，但对于有限的注释数据可能会有所帮助。实验结果表明，使用弱教师和未见过的数据来训练多任务学生时，性能会有所提高。尽管设置有限，我们相信实验结果显示了多任务知识蒸馏和自我训练的潜力，这可能有利于未来的研究。源代码位于 https://lhoangan.github.io/multas。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限标注数据条件下，自训练与多任务学习在目标检测任务中的应用与对比评估。
AI.motivation: 自训练和多任务学习通常需要大量数据（如预训练好的教师模型或多任务标注），而实际场景中标注数据有限。本文旨在放松这些假设，探索在数据不足情况下这两种方法的潜力。
AI.method: 对比两种场景：1）自训练中教师训练数据不足，学生使用教师未见过的数据进行训练；2）多任务学习中每个训练样本只有单任务标注（部分标注）。同时探索将两者结合，使用弱教师模型与未见数据训练多任务学生。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，使用弱教师模型结合未见数据来训练多任务学生，能够提升目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 尽管实验设置有限，但结果显示了多任务知识蒸馏与自训练在有限数据场景下的潜力，可为未来研究提供参考。

authors_text: Mutahar Safdar,Jiarui Xie,Hyunwoong Ko,Yan Lu,Guy Lamouche,Yaoyao Fiona Zhao
title: Transferability analysis of data-driven additive manufacturing knowledge: a case study between powder bed fusion and directed energy deposition
title_zh: 数据驱动的增材制造知识的可转移性分析：粉末床融合和定向能量沉积之间的案例研究
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. This paper has been accepted to be published in the proceedings of IDETC-CIE 2023
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures. This paper has been accepted to be published in the proceedings of IDETC-CIE 2023
abstract: Data-driven research in Additive Manufacturing (AM) has gained significant success in recent years. This has led to a plethora of scientific literature to emerge. The knowledge in these works consists of AM and Artificial Intelligence (AI) contexts that have not been mined and formalized in an integrated way. Moreover, no tools or guidelines exist to support data-driven knowledge transfer from one context to another. As a result, data-driven solutions using specific AI techniques are being developed and validated only for specific AM process technologies. There is a potential to exploit the inherent similarities across various AM technologies and adapt the existing solutions from one process or problem to another using AI, such as Transfer Learning. We propose a three-step knowledge transferability analysis framework in AM to support data-driven AM knowledge transfer. As a prerequisite to transferability analysis, AM knowledge is featurized into identified knowledge components. The framework consists of pre-transfer, transfer, and post-transfer steps to accomplish knowledge transfer. A case study is conducted between flagship metal AM processes. Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) is the source of knowledge motivated by its relative matureness in applying AI over Directed Energy Deposition (DED), which drives the need for knowledge transfer as the less explored target process. We show successful transfer at different levels of the data-driven solution, including data representation, model architecture, and model parameters. The pipeline of AM knowledge transfer can be automated in the future to allow efficient cross-context or cross-process knowledge exchange.
summary: Data-driven research in Additive Manufacturing (AM) has gained significant success in recent years. This has led to a plethora of scientific literature to emerge. The knowledge in these works consists of AM and Artificial Intelligence (AI) contexts that have not been mined and formalized in an integrated way. Moreover, no tools or guidelines exist to support data-driven knowledge transfer from one context to another. As a result, data-driven solutions using specific AI techniques are being developed and validated only for specific AM process technologies. There is a potential to exploit the inherent similarities across various AM technologies and adapt the existing solutions from one process or problem to another using AI, such as Transfer Learning. We propose a three-step knowledge transferability analysis framework in AM to support data-driven AM knowledge transfer. As a prerequisite to transferability analysis, AM knowledge is featurized into identified knowledge components. The framework consists of pre-transfer, transfer, and post-transfer steps to accomplish knowledge transfer. A case study is conducted between flagship metal AM processes. Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) is the source of knowledge motivated by its relative matureness in applying AI over Directed Energy Deposition (DED), which drives the need for knowledge transfer as the less explored target process. We show successful transfer at different levels of the data-driven solution, including data representation, model architecture, and model parameters. The pipeline of AM knowledge transfer can be automated in the future to allow efficient cross-context or cross-process knowledge exchange.
abstract_zh: 近年来，增材制造 (AM) 领域的数据驱动研究取得了巨大成功。这导致了大量科学文献的出现。这些作品中的知识由增材制造和人工智能 (AI) 背景组成，尚未以综合方式进行挖掘和形式化。此外，不存在任何工具或指南来支持数据驱动的知识从一种环境到另一种环境的转移。因此，使用特定人工智能技术的数据驱动解决方案仅针对特定的增材制造工艺技术进行开发和验证。有可能利用各种增材制造技术之间的内在相似性，并使用人工智能（例如迁移学习）将现有解决方案从一个流程或问题调整为另一个流程或问题。我们提出了增材制造中的三步知识可转移性分析框架，以支持数据驱动的增材制造知识转移。作为可转移性分析的先决条件，增材制造知识被特征化为已识别的知识组件。该框架由迁移前、迁移和迁移后步骤组成，以完成知识迁移。对旗舰金属增材制造工艺进行了案例研究。激光粉床聚变 (LPBF) 是知识的来源，其在应用人工智能相对于定向能量沉积 (DED) 方面相对成熟，这推动了知识转移的需求，作为较少探索的目标过程。我们展示了数据驱动解决方案不同级别的成功传输，包括数据表示、模型架构和模型参数。增材制造知识转移的管道未来可以实现自动化，以实现高效的跨上下文或跨流程知识交换。

AI.tldr: 提出一个三步骤的知识可迁移性分析框架，用于在增材制造（AM）领域实现数据驱动知识的跨工艺转移，并通过LPBF到DED的案例验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的数据驱动增材制造解决方案通常只针对特定工艺技术开发和验证，缺乏跨上下文知识转移的工具和指南，而不同AM技术之间存在内在相似性，可借此利用迁移学习将已有知识从成熟过程转移到较少探索的过程。
AI.method: 提出一个三步骤知识可迁移性分析框架：前转移（pre-transfer）、转移（transfer）和后转移（post-transfer），首先将AM知识特征化为识别出的知识组件，再通过案例研究在LPBF（源）和DED（目标）之间进行知识转移。
AI.result: 成功在数据表示、模型架构和模型参数等多个层面实现了从LPBF到DED的知识迁移。
AI.conclusion: 该AM知识转移流程未来可以实现自动化，从而支持高效的跨上下文或跨工艺知识交换。

method: 提出一个三步骤知识可迁移性分析框架：前转移（pre-transfer）、转移（transfer）和后转移（post-transfer），首先将AM知识特征化为识别出的知识组件，再通过案例研究在LPBF（源）和DED（目标）之间进行知识转移。
result: 成功在数据表示、模型架构和模型参数等多个层面实现了从LPBF到DED的知识迁移。
conclusion: 该AM知识转移流程未来可以实现自动化，从而支持高效的跨上下文或跨工艺知识交换。
search_text: Transferability analysis of data-driven additive manufacturing knowledge: a case study between powder bed fusion and directed energy deposition 数据驱动的增材制造知识的可转移性分析：粉末床融合和定向能量沉积之间的案例研究 Data-driven research in Additive Manufacturing (AM) has gained significant success in recent years. This has led to a plethora of scientific literature to emerge. The knowledge in these works consists of AM and Artificial Intelligence (AI) contexts that have not been mined and formalized in an integrated way. Moreover, no tools or guidelines exist to support data-driven knowledge transfer from one context to another. As a result, data-driven solutions using specific AI techniques are being developed and validated only for specific AM process technologies. There is a potential to exploit the inherent similarities across various AM technologies and adapt the existing solutions from one process or problem to another using AI, such as Transfer Learning. We propose a three-step knowledge transferability analysis framework in AM to support data-driven AM knowledge transfer. As a prerequisite to transferability analysis, AM knowledge is featurized into identified knowledge components. The framework consists of pre-transfer, transfer, and post-transfer steps to accomplish knowledge transfer. A case study is conducted between flagship metal AM processes. Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) is the source of knowledge motivated by its relative matureness in applying AI over Directed Energy Deposition (DED), which drives the need for knowledge transfer as the less explored target process. We show successful transfer at different levels of the data-driven solution, including data representation, model architecture, and model parameters. The pipeline of AM knowledge transfer can be automated in the future to allow efficient cross-context or cross-process knowledge exchange. 近年来，增材制造 (AM) 领域的数据驱动研究取得了巨大成功。这导致了大量科学文献的出现。这些作品中的知识由增材制造和人工智能 (AI) 背景组成，尚未以综合方式进行挖掘和形式化。此外，不存在任何工具或指南来支持数据驱动的知识从一种环境到另一种环境的转移。因此，使用特定人工智能技术的数据驱动解决方案仅针对特定的增材制造工艺技术进行开发和验证。有可能利用各种增材制造技术之间的内在相似性，并使用人工智能（例如迁移学习）将现有解决方案从一个流程或问题调整为另一个流程或问题。我们提出了增材制造中的三步知识可转移性分析框架，以支持数据驱动的增材制造知识转移。作为可转移性分析的先决条件，增材制造知识被特征化为已识别的知识组件。该框架由迁移前、迁移和迁移后步骤组成，以完成知识迁移。对旗舰金属增材制造工艺进行了案例研究。激光粉床聚变 (LPBF) 是知识的来源，其在应用人工智能相对于定向能量沉积 (DED) 方面相对成熟，这推动了知识转移的需求，作为较少探索的目标过程。我们展示了数据驱动解决方案不同级别的成功传输，包括数据表示、模型架构和模型参数。增材制造知识转移的管道未来可以实现自动化，以实现高效的跨上下文或跨流程知识交换。 提出一个三步骤的知识可迁移性分析框架，用于在增材制造（AM）领域实现数据驱动知识的跨工艺转移，并通过LPBF到DED的案例验证其有效性。 Mutahar Safdar,Jiarui Xie,Hyunwoong Ko,Yan Lu,Guy Lamouche,Yaoyao Fiona Zhao cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Bavesh Balaji,Jerrin Bright,Harish Prakash,Yuhao Chen,David A Clausi,John Zelek
title: Jersey Number Recognition using Keyframe Identification from Low-Resolution Broadcast Videos
title_zh: 使用低分辨率广播视频中的关键帧识别进行球衣号码识别
comment: Accepted in the 6th International Workshop on Multimedia Content Analysis in Sports (MMSports'23) @ ACM Multimedia
comments: Accepted in the 6th International Workshop on Multimedia Content Analysis in Sports (MMSports'23) @ ACM Multimedia
abstract: Player identification is a crucial component in vision-driven soccer analytics, enabling various downstream tasks such as player assessment, in-game analysis, and broadcast production. However, automatically detecting jersey numbers from player tracklets in videos presents challenges due to motion blur, low resolution, distortions, and occlusions. Existing methods, utilizing Spatial Transformer Networks, CNNs, and Vision Transformers, have shown success in image data but struggle with real-world video data, where jersey numbers are not visible in most of the frames. Hence, identifying frames that contain the jersey number is a key sub-problem to tackle. To address these issues, we propose a robust keyframe identification module that extracts frames containing essential high-level information about the jersey number. A spatio-temporal network is then employed to model spatial and temporal context and predict the probabilities of jersey numbers in the video. Additionally, we adopt a multi-task loss function to predict the probability distribution of each digit separately. Extensive evaluations on the SoccerNet dataset demonstrate that incorporating our proposed keyframe identification module results in a significant 37.81% and 37.70% increase in the accuracies of 2 different test sets with domain gaps. These results highlight the effectiveness and importance of our approach in tackling the challenges of automatic jersey number detection in sports videos.
summary: Player identification is a crucial component in vision-driven soccer analytics, enabling various downstream tasks such as player assessment, in-game analysis, and broadcast production. However, automatically detecting jersey numbers from player tracklets in videos presents challenges due to motion blur, low resolution, distortions, and occlusions. Existing methods, utilizing Spatial Transformer Networks, CNNs, and Vision Transformers, have shown success in image data but struggle with real-world video data, where jersey numbers are not visible in most of the frames. Hence, identifying frames that contain the jersey number is a key sub-problem to tackle. To address these issues, we propose a robust keyframe identification module that extracts frames containing essential high-level information about the jersey number. A spatio-temporal network is then employed to model spatial and temporal context and predict the probabilities of jersey numbers in the video. Additionally, we adopt a multi-task loss function to predict the probability distribution of each digit separately. Extensive evaluations on the SoccerNet dataset demonstrate that incorporating our proposed keyframe identification module results in a significant 37.81% and 37.70% increase in the accuracies of 2 different test sets with domain gaps. These results highlight the effectiveness and importance of our approach in tackling the challenges of automatic jersey number detection in sports videos.
abstract_zh: 球员识别是视觉驱动的足球分析的重要组成部分，支持各种下游任务，例如球员评估、比赛中分析和广播制作。然而，由于运动模糊、低分辨率、扭曲和遮挡，从视频中的球员轨迹中自动检测球衣号码会带来挑战。现有的方法，利用空间变换器网络、CNN 和视觉变换器，在图像数据方面取得了成功，但在处理现实世界的视频数据时却遇到了困难，因为在大多数帧中球衣号码是不可见的。因此，识别包含球衣号码的帧是需要解决的关键子问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一个强大的关键帧识别模块，该模块可以提取包含有关球衣号码的基本高级信息的帧。然后采用时空网络对空间和时间上下文进行建模，并预测视频中球衣号码的概率。此外，我们采用多任务损失函数来分别预测每个数字的概率分布。对 SoccerNet 数据集的广泛评估表明，结合我们提出的关键帧识别模块可以使具有域间隙的 2 个不同测试集的准确度显着提高 37.81% 和 37.70%。这些结果凸显了我们的方法在应对体育视频中自动球衣号码检测挑战方面的有效性和重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从低分辨率广播视频中识别球员球衣号码的方法，核心是结合关键帧识别模块和时空网络来实现鲁棒的号码检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在图像数据上表现良好，但在真实视频数据中，大多数帧中球衣号码不可见，存在运动模糊、低分辨率、畸变和遮挡等问题，因此需要识别包含号码的关键帧。
AI.method: 提出一个鲁棒的关键帧识别模块，提取包含球衣号码高層信息的帧；然后采用时空网络建模空间和时间上下文，预测视频中球衣号码的概率；同时使用多任务损失函数分别预测每个数字的概率分布。
AI.result: 在SoccerNet数据集上的评估表明，加入关键帧识别模块后，在两个不同测试集上的准确率分别提升了37.81%和37.70%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在自动球衣号码检测任务中展示了显著的效果和重要性，有效应对了体育视频中的实际挑战。

authors_text: Yin Wang,Zhiying Leng,Frederick W. B. Li,Shun-Cheng Wu,Xiaohui Liang
title: Fg-T2M: Fine-Grained Text-Driven Human Motion Generation via Diffusion Model
title_zh: Fg-T2M：通过扩散模型生成细粒度文本驱动的人体运动
abstract: Text-driven human motion generation in computer vision is both significant and challenging. However, current methods are limited to producing either deterministic or imprecise motion sequences, failing to effectively control the temporal and spatial relationships required to conform to a given text description. In this work, we propose a fine-grained method for generating high-quality, conditional human motion sequences supporting precise text description. Our approach consists of two key components: 1) a linguistics-structure assisted module that constructs accurate and complete language feature to fully utilize text information; and 2) a context-aware progressive reasoning module that learns neighborhood and overall semantic linguistics features from shallow and deep graph neural networks to achieve a multi-step inference. Experiments show that our approach outperforms text-driven motion generation methods on HumanML3D and KIT test sets and generates better visually confirmed motion to the text conditions.
summary: Text-driven human motion generation in computer vision is both significant and challenging. However, current methods are limited to producing either deterministic or imprecise motion sequences, failing to effectively control the temporal and spatial relationships required to conform to a given text description. In this work, we propose a fine-grained method for generating high-quality, conditional human motion sequences supporting precise text description. Our approach consists of two key components: 1) a linguistics-structure assisted module that constructs accurate and complete language feature to fully utilize text information; and 2) a context-aware progressive reasoning module that learns neighborhood and overall semantic linguistics features from shallow and deep graph neural networks to achieve a multi-step inference. Experiments show that our approach outperforms text-driven motion generation methods on HumanML3D and KIT test sets and generates better visually confirmed motion to the text conditions.
abstract_zh: 计算机视觉中文本驱动的人体运动生成既重要又具有挑战性。然而，当前的方法仅限于产生确定性或不精确的运动序列，无法有效地控制符合给定文本描述所需的时间和空间关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种细粒度的方法，用于生成支持精确文本描述的高质量、有条件的人体运动序列。我们的方法由两个关键组成部分组成：1）语言学结构辅助模块，构建准确且完整的语言特征以充分利用文本信息； 2）上下文感知渐进推理模块，从浅层和深层图神经网络学习邻域和整体语义语言学特征，以实现多步推理。实验表明，我们的方法在 HumanML3D 和 KIT 测试集上优于文本驱动的运动生成方法，并根据文本条件生成更好的视觉确认运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的细粒度文本驱动人体动作生成方法Fg-T2M，旨在根据精确文本描述生成高质量、可控的人体运动序列。
AI.motivation: 现有方法只能生成确定性或不精确的动作序列，无法有效控制文本描述所需的时空关系，难以生成与文本精确匹配的高质量动作。
AI.method: 方法包含两个核心模块：1) 语言学结构辅助模块，构建准确完整的语言特征以充分利用文本信息；2) 上下文感知渐进推理模块，通过浅层和深层图神经网络学习局部和整体语义特征，实现多步推理。
AI.result: 在HumanML3D和KIT测试集上，本方法优于现有文本驱动动作生成方法，生成的动作在视觉上更符合文本条件。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的细粒度方法能够有效提升文本驱动人体动作生成的质量和文本对齐精度，验证了语言学结构辅助和上下文感知渐进推理的有效性。

motivation: 现有方法只能生成确定性或不精确的动作序列，无法有效控制文本描述所需的时空关系，难以生成与文本精确匹配的高质量动作。
method: 方法包含两个核心模块：1) 语言学结构辅助模块，构建准确完整的语言特征以充分利用文本信息；2) 上下文感知渐进推理模块，通过浅层和深层图神经网络学习局部和整体语义特征，实现多步推理。
result: 在HumanML3D和KIT测试集上，本方法优于现有文本驱动动作生成方法，生成的动作在视觉上更符合文本条件。
conclusion: 所提出的细粒度方法能够有效提升文本驱动人体动作生成的质量和文本对齐精度，验证了语言学结构辅助和上下文感知渐进推理的有效性。
search_text: Fg-T2M: Fine-Grained Text-Driven Human Motion Generation via Diffusion Model Fg-T2M：通过扩散模型生成细粒度文本驱动的人体运动 Text-driven human motion generation in computer vision is both significant and challenging. However, current methods are limited to producing either deterministic or imprecise motion sequences, failing to effectively control the temporal and spatial relationships required to conform to a given text description. In this work, we propose a fine-grained method for generating high-quality, conditional human motion sequences supporting precise text description. Our approach consists of two key components: 1) a linguistics-structure assisted module that constructs accurate and complete language feature to fully utilize text information; and 2) a context-aware progressive reasoning module that learns neighborhood and overall semantic linguistics features from shallow and deep graph neural networks to achieve a multi-step inference. Experiments show that our approach outperforms text-driven motion generation methods on HumanML3D and KIT test sets and generates better visually confirmed motion to the text conditions. 计算机视觉中文本驱动的人体运动生成既重要又具有挑战性。然而，当前的方法仅限于产生确定性或不精确的运动序列，无法有效地控制符合给定文本描述所需的时间和空间关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种细粒度的方法，用于生成支持精确文本描述的高质量、有条件的人体运动序列。我们的方法由两个关键组成部分组成：1）语言学结构辅助模块，构建准确且完整的语言特征以充分利用文本信息； 2）上下文感知渐进推理模块，从浅层和深层图神经网络学习邻域和整体语义语言学特征，以实现多步推理。实验表明，我们的方法在 HumanML3D 和 KIT 测试集上优于文本驱动的运动生成方法，并根据文本条件生成更好的视觉确认运动。 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的细粒度文本驱动人体动作生成方法Fg-T2M，旨在根据精确文本描述生成高质量、可控的人体运动序列。 Yin Wang,Zhiying Leng,Frederick W. B. Li,Shun-Cheng Wu,Xiaohui Liang cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Qiyu Sun,Huilin Chen,Meng Zheng,Ziyan Wu,Michael Felsberg,Yang Tang
title: IBAFormer: Intra-batch Attention Transformer for Domain Generalized Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: IBAFormer：用于域广义语义分割的批内注意力变压器
abstract: Domain generalized semantic segmentation (DGSS) is a critical yet challenging task, where the model is trained only on source data without access to any target data. Despite the proposal of numerous DGSS strategies, the generalization capability remains limited in CNN architectures. Though some Transformer-based segmentation models show promising performance, they primarily focus on capturing intra-sample attentive relationships, disregarding inter-sample correlations which can potentially benefit DGSS. To this end, we enhance the attention modules in Transformer networks for improving DGSS by incorporating information from other independent samples in the same batch, enriching contextual information, and diversifying the training data for each attention block. Specifically, we propose two alternative intra-batch attention mechanisms, namely mean-based intra-batch attention (MIBA) and element-wise intra-batch attention (EIBA), to capture correlations between different samples, enhancing feature representation and generalization capabilities. Building upon intra-batch attention, we introduce IBAFormer, which integrates self-attention modules with the proposed intra-batch attention for DGSS. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IBAFormer achieves SOTA performance in DGSS, and ablation studies further confirm the effectiveness of each introduced component.
summary: Domain generalized semantic segmentation (DGSS) is a critical yet challenging task, where the model is trained only on source data without access to any target data. Despite the proposal of numerous DGSS strategies, the generalization capability remains limited in CNN architectures. Though some Transformer-based segmentation models show promising performance, they primarily focus on capturing intra-sample attentive relationships, disregarding inter-sample correlations which can potentially benefit DGSS. To this end, we enhance the attention modules in Transformer networks for improving DGSS by incorporating information from other independent samples in the same batch, enriching contextual information, and diversifying the training data for each attention block. Specifically, we propose two alternative intra-batch attention mechanisms, namely mean-based intra-batch attention (MIBA) and element-wise intra-batch attention (EIBA), to capture correlations between different samples, enhancing feature representation and generalization capabilities. Building upon intra-batch attention, we introduce IBAFormer, which integrates self-attention modules with the proposed intra-batch attention for DGSS. Extensive experiments demonstrate that IBAFormer achieves SOTA performance in DGSS, and ablation studies further confirm the effectiveness of each introduced component.
abstract_zh: 领域广义语义分割（DGSS）是一项关键但具有挑战性的任务，其中模型仅在源数据上进行训练，而无需访问任何目标数据。尽管提出了许多 DGSS 策略，但 CNN 架构的泛化能力仍然有限。尽管一些基于 Transformer 的分割模型显示出良好的性能，但它们主要侧重于捕获样本内的关注关系，而忽略了可能有利于 DGSS 的样本间相关性。为此，我们增强了 Transformer 网络中的注意力模块，通过合并同一批次中其他独立样本的信息、丰富上下文信息并使每个注意力块的训练数据多样化来改进 DGSS。具体来说，我们提出了两种替代的批内注意机制，即基于均值的批内注意（MIBA）和逐元素的批内注意（EIBA），以捕获不同样本之间的相关性，增强特征表示和泛化能力。在批内注意力的基础上，我们引入了 IBAFormer，它将自注意力模块与建议的 DGSS 批内注意力集成在一起。大量实验表明 IBAFormer 在 DGSS 中实现了 SOTA 性能，消融研究进一步证实了每个引入组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于批内注意力机制的Transformer框架，用于域泛化语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer分割模型仅关注样本内注意力关系，忽略了样本间相关性，而样本间信息有助于提升域泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出了两种批内注意力机制：基于均值的批内注意力（MIBA）和逐元素的批内注意力（EIBA），捕获不同样本间的相关性，并与自注意力模块集成形成IBAFormer。
AI.result: 在域泛化语义分割任务上取得了最先进的性能，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入批内注意力机制，有效增强了Transformer的域泛化能力，为DGSS提供了新的有效方案。
