authors_text: Qinpeng Cui,Xinyi Zhang,Qiqi Bao,Qingmin Liao
title: Elucidating the solution space of extended reverse-time SDE for diffusion models
title_zh: 阐明扩散模型的扩展逆时 SDE 的解空间
comment: This paper has been accepted by WACV 2025 (Oral). The official version lacked proper attribution to the co-authors, and this version has been updated accordingly
comments: This paper has been accepted by WACV 2025 (Oral). The official version lacked proper attribution to the co-authors, and this version has been updated accordingly
abstract: Sampling from Diffusion Models can alternatively be seen as solving differential equations, where there is a challenge in balancing speed and image visual quality. ODE-based samplers offer rapid sampling time but reach a performance limit, whereas SDE-based samplers achieve superior quality, albeit with longer iterations. In this work, we formulate the sampling process as an Extended Reverse-Time SDE (ER SDE), unifying prior explorations into ODEs and SDEs. Theoretically, leveraging the semi-linear structure of ER SDE solutions, we offer exact solutions and approximate solutions for VP SDE and VE SDE, respectively. Based on the approximate solution space of the ER SDE, referred to as one-step prediction errors, we yield mathematical insights elucidating the rapid sampling capability of ODE solvers and the high-quality sampling ability of SDE solvers. Additionally, we unveil that VP SDE solvers stand on par with their VE SDE counterparts. Based on these findings, leveraging the dual advantages of ODE solvers and SDE solvers, we devise efficient high-quality samplers, namely ER-SDE-Solvers. Experimental results demonstrate that ER-SDE-Solvers achieve state-of-the-art performance across all stochastic samplers while maintaining efficiency of deterministic samplers. Specifically, on the ImageNet $128\times128$ dataset, ER-SDE-Solvers obtain 8.33 FID in only 20 function evaluations. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}

ODE-based samplers offer rapid sampling time but reach a performance limit, whereas SDE-based samplers achieve superior quality, albeit with longer iterations. In this work, we formulate the sampling process as an Extended Reverse-Time SDE (ER SDE), unifying prior explorations into ODEs and SDEs. Theoretically, leveraging the semi-linear structure of ER SDE solutions, we offer exact solutions and approximate solutions for VP SDE and VE SDE, respectively. Based on the approximate solution space of the ER SDE, referred to as one-step prediction errors, we yield mathematical insights elucidating the rapid sampling capability of ODE solvers and the high-quality sampling ability of SDE solvers. Additionally, we unveil that VP SDE solvers stand on par with their VE SDE counterparts. Based on these findings, leveraging the dual advantages of ODE solvers and SDE solvers, we devise efficient high-quality samplers, namely ER-SDE-Solvers. Experimental results demonstrate that ER-SDE-Solvers achieve state-of-the-art performance across all stochastic samplers while maintaining efficiency of deterministic samplers. Specifically, on the ImageNet $128\times128$ dataset, ER-SDE-Solvers obtain 8.33 FID in only 20 function evaluations. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}
abstract_zh: 从扩散模型中采样也可以被视为求解微分方程，其中在平衡速度和图像视觉质量方面存在挑战。基于 ODE 的采样器提供快速采样时间，但达到了性能限制，而基于 SDE 的采样器实现了卓越的质量，尽管迭代时间较长。在这项工作中，我们将采样过程表述为扩展反时 SDE (ER SDE)，将之前的探索统一到 ODE 和 SDE。理论上，利用ER SDE解的半线性结构，我们分别为VP SDE和VE SDE提供精确解和近似解。基于 ER SDE 的近似解空间（称为一步预测误差），我们得出了数学见解，阐明了 ODE 求解器的快速采样能力和 SDE 求解器的高质量采样能力。此外，我们还推出了 VP SDE 求解器与 VE SDE 求解器相当。基于这些发现，利用 ODE 求解器和 SDE 求解器的双重优势，我们设计了高效的高质量采样器，即 ER-SDE-Solvers。实验结果表明，ER-SDE 求解器在所有随机采样器中实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了确定性采样器的效率。具体来说，在 ImageNet $128\times128$ 数据集上，ER-SDE-Solvers 仅在 20 次函数评估中获得了 8.33 FID。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver} 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出扩展反向时间SDE（ER SDE）统一了扩散模型的ODE和SDE采样框架，并设计了兼顾速度与质量的ER-SDE-Solver采样器。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型采样中，ODE求解器速度快但性能有上限，SDE求解器质量高但迭代时间长，两者难以兼顾速度与图像视觉质量。
AI.method: 通过将采样过程建模为扩展反向时间SDE（ER SDE），利用其半线性结构推导VP SDE的精确解和VE SDE的近似解；基于一步预测误差的近似解空间，从数学上揭示ODE快速采样和SDE高质量采样的内在原因，进而融合两者优势设计ER-SDE-Solver。
AI.result: 在ImageNet 128×128数据集上，仅用20次函数评估即可达到8.33 FID，在所有随机采样器中取得最优性能，同时保持确定性采样器的高效率。
AI.conclusion: ER-SDE-Solver实现了随机采样器的最佳质量与确定性采样器的高效率的统一，证明了该方法在扩散模型采样中速度与质量平衡方面的有效性。

method: 通过将采样过程建模为扩展反向时间SDE（ER SDE），利用其半线性结构推导VP SDE的精确解和VE SDE的近似解；基于一步预测误差的近似解空间，从数学上揭示ODE快速采样和SDE高质量采样的内在原因，进而融合两者优势设计ER-SDE-Solver。
result: 在ImageNet 128×128数据集上，仅用20次函数评估即可达到8.33 FID，在所有随机采样器中取得最优性能，同时保持确定性采样器的高效率。
conclusion: ER-SDE-Solver实现了随机采样器的最佳质量与确定性采样器的高效率的统一，证明了该方法在扩散模型采样中速度与质量平衡方面的有效性。
search_text: Elucidating the solution space of extended reverse-time SDE for diffusion models 阐明扩散模型的扩展逆时 SDE 的解空间 Sampling from Diffusion Models can alternatively be seen as solving differential equations, where there is a challenge in balancing speed and image visual quality. ODE-based samplers offer rapid sampling time but reach a performance limit, whereas SDE-based samplers achieve superior quality, albeit with longer iterations. In this work, we formulate the sampling process as an Extended Reverse-Time SDE (ER SDE), unifying prior explorations into ODEs and SDEs. Theoretically, leveraging the semi-linear structure of ER SDE solutions, we offer exact solutions and approximate solutions for VP SDE and VE SDE, respectively. Based on the approximate solution space of the ER SDE, referred to as one-step prediction errors, we yield mathematical insights elucidating the rapid sampling capability of ODE solvers and the high-quality sampling ability of SDE solvers. Additionally, we unveil that VP SDE solvers stand on par with their VE SDE counterparts. Based on these findings, leveraging the dual advantages of ODE solvers and SDE solvers, we devise efficient high-quality samplers, namely ER-SDE-Solvers. Experimental results demonstrate that ER-SDE-Solvers achieve state-of-the-art performance across all stochastic samplers while maintaining efficiency of deterministic samplers. Specifically, on the ImageNet $128\times128$ dataset, ER-SDE-Solvers obtain 8.33 FID in only 20 function evaluations. Code is available at \href{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver} 从扩散模型中采样也可以被视为求解微分方程，其中在平衡速度和图像视觉质量方面存在挑战。基于 ODE 的采样器提供快速采样时间，但达到了性能限制，而基于 SDE 的采样器实现了卓越的质量，尽管迭代时间较长。在这项工作中，我们将采样过程表述为扩展反时 SDE (ER SDE)，将之前的探索统一到 ODE 和 SDE。理论上，利用ER SDE解的半线性结构，我们分别为VP SDE和VE SDE提供精确解和近似解。基于 ER SDE 的近似解空间（称为一步预测误差），我们得出了数学见解，阐明了 ODE 求解器的快速采样能力和 SDE 求解器的高质量采样能力。此外，我们还推出了 VP SDE 求解器与 VE SDE 求解器相当。基于这些发现，利用 ODE 求解器和 SDE 求解器的双重优势，我们设计了高效的高质量采样器，即 ER-SDE-Solvers。实验结果表明，ER-SDE 求解器在所有随机采样器中实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了确定性采样器的效率。具体来说，在 ImageNet $128\times128$ 数据集上，ER-SDE-Solvers 仅在 20 次函数评估中获得了 8.33 FID。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver}{https://github.com/QinpengCui/ER-SDE-Solver} 获取 本文提出扩展反向时间SDE（ER SDE）统一了扩散模型的ODE和SDE采样框架，并设计了兼顾速度与质量的ER-SDE-Solver采样器。 Qinpeng Cui,Xinyi Zhang,Qiqi Bao,Qingmin Liao cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Amr Elsharkawy,Xiao-Ting Michelle To,Philipp Seitz,Yanbin Chen,Yannick Stade,Manuel Geiger,Qunsheng Huang,Xiaorang Guo,Muhammad Arslan Ansari,Christian B. Mendl,Dieter Kranzlmüller,Martin Schulz
title: Integration of Quantum Accelerators with High Performance Computing -- A Review of Quantum Programming Tools
title_zh: 量子加速器与高性能计算的集成——量子编程工具回顾
abstract: Quantum computing (QC) introduces a novel mode of computation with the possibility of greater computational power that remains to be exploited - presenting exciting opportunities for high performance computing (HPC) applications. However, recent advancements in the field have made clear that QC does not supplant conventional HPC, but can rather be incorporated into current heterogeneous HPC infrastructures as an additional accelerator, thereby enabling the optimal utilization of both paradigms. The desire for such integration significantly affects the development of software for quantum computers, which in turn influences the necessary software infrastructure. To date, previous review papers have investigated various quantum programming tools (QPTs) (such as languages, libraries, frameworks) in their ability to program, compile, and execute quantum circuits. However, the integration effort with classical HPC frameworks or systems has not been addressed. This study aims to characterize existing QPTs from an HPC perspective, investigating if existing QPTs have the potential to be efficiently integrated with classical computing models and determining where work is still required. This work structures a set of criteria into an analysis blueprint that enables HPC scientists to assess whether a QPT is suitable for the quantum-accelerated classical application at hand.
summary: Quantum computing (QC) introduces a novel mode of computation with the possibility of greater computational power that remains to be exploited - presenting exciting opportunities for high performance computing (HPC) applications. However, recent advancements in the field have made clear that QC does not supplant conventional HPC, but can rather be incorporated into current heterogeneous HPC infrastructures as an additional accelerator, thereby enabling the optimal utilization of both paradigms. The desire for such integration significantly affects the development of software for quantum computers, which in turn influences the necessary software infrastructure. To date, previous review papers have investigated various quantum programming tools (QPTs) (such as languages, libraries, frameworks) in their ability to program, compile, and execute quantum circuits. However, the integration effort with classical HPC frameworks or systems has not been addressed. This study aims to characterize existing QPTs from an HPC perspective, investigating if existing QPTs have the potential to be efficiently integrated with classical computing models and determining where work is still required. This work structures a set of criteria into an analysis blueprint that enables HPC scientists to assess whether a QPT is suitable for the quantum-accelerated classical application at hand.
abstract_zh: 量子计算 (QC) 引入了一种新颖的计算模式，具有有待开发的更大计算能力的可能性 - 为高性能计算 (HPC) 应用提供了令人兴奋的机会。然而，该领域的最新进展表明，QC 不会取代传统的 HPC，而是可以作为额外的加速器纳入当前的异构 HPC 基础设施中，从而实现两种范式的最佳利用。对这种集成的渴望极大地影响了量子计算机软件的开发，进而影响了必要的软件基础设施。迄今为止，之前的评论论文已经研究了各种量子编程工具（QPT）（例如语言、库、框架）的编程、编译和执行量子电路的能力。然而，与经典 HPC 框架或系统的集成工作尚未得到解决。本研究旨在从 HPC 角度描述现有 QPT 的特征，调查现有 QPT 是否有潜力与经典计算模型有效集成，并确定哪些地方仍需要工作。这项工作将一组标准构建成分析蓝图，使 HPC 科学家能够评估 QPT 是否适合当前的量子加速经典应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了量子编程工具（QPTs）从高性能计算（HPC）角度与经典计算模型集成的现状，提出了一套评估QPTs是否适合量子加速经典应用的分析蓝图。
AI.motivation: 现有综述论文研究了量子编程工具在编程、编译和执行量子电路方面的能力，但未关注其与经典HPC框架或系统的集成问题。本文旨在从HPC视角分析现有QPTs，探讨其与经典计算模型高效集成的潜力，并找出仍需努力的方面。
AI.method: 构建了一套分析标准，形成分析蓝图，使HPC科学家能够评估QPTs是否适合所涉及的量子加速经典应用。
AI.result: 提出了一套结构化的评估标准与分析蓝图，用于从HPC视角评估量子编程工具的集成潜力。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算不会取代传统HPC，而是作为附加加速器融入异构HPC基础设施，从而实现两种范式的最佳利用；本文提供的分析蓝图有助于指导未来的量子-经典混合计算软件基础设施发展。

authors_text: Max Losch,David Stutz,Bernt Schiele,Mario Fritz
title: Certified Robust Models with Slack Control and Large Lipschitz Constants
title_zh: 具有松弛控制和大 Lipschitz 常数的经过认证的鲁棒模型
abstract: Despite recent success, state-of-the-art learning-based models remain highly vulnerable to input changes such as adversarial examples. In order to obtain certifiable robustness against such perturbations, recent work considers Lipschitz-based regularizers or constraints while at the same time increasing prediction margin. Unfortunately, this comes at the cost of significantly decreased accuracy. In this paper, we propose a Calibrated Lipschitz-Margin Loss (CLL) that addresses this issue and improves certified robustness by tackling two problems: Firstly, commonly used margin losses do not adjust the penalties to the shrinking output distribution; caused by minimizing the Lipschitz constant $K$. Secondly, and most importantly, we observe that minimization of $K$ can lead to overly smooth decision functions. This limits the model's complexity and thus reduces accuracy. Our CLL addresses these issues by explicitly calibrating the loss w.r.t. margin and Lipschitz constant, thereby establishing full control over slack and improving robustness certificates even with larger Lipschitz constants. On CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, our models consistently outperform losses that leave the constant unattended. On CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, CLL improves upon state-of-the-art deterministic $L_2$ robust accuracies. In contrast to current trends, we unlock potential of much smaller models without $K=1$ constraints.
summary: Despite recent success, state-of-the-art learning-based models remain highly vulnerable to input changes such as adversarial examples. In order to obtain certifiable robustness against such perturbations, recent work considers Lipschitz-based regularizers or constraints while at the same time increasing prediction margin. Unfortunately, this comes at the cost of significantly decreased accuracy. In this paper, we propose a Calibrated Lipschitz-Margin Loss (CLL) that addresses this issue and improves certified robustness by tackling two problems: Firstly, commonly used margin losses do not adjust the penalties to the shrinking output distribution; caused by minimizing the Lipschitz constant $K$. Secondly, and most importantly, we observe that minimization of $K$ can lead to overly smooth decision functions. This limits the model's complexity and thus reduces accuracy. Our CLL addresses these issues by explicitly calibrating the loss w.r.t. margin and Lipschitz constant, thereby establishing full control over slack and improving robustness certificates even with larger Lipschitz constants. On CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, our models consistently outperform losses that leave the constant unattended. On CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, CLL improves upon state-of-the-art deterministic $L_2$ robust accuracies. In contrast to current trends, we unlock potential of much smaller models without $K=1$ constraints.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近取得了成功，但最先进的基于学习的模型仍然非常容易受到输入变化（例如对抗性示例）的影响。为了获得针对此类扰动的可证明的鲁棒性，最近的工作考虑了基于 Lipschitz 的正则化器或约束，同时增加了预测裕度。不幸的是，这是以显着降低准确性为代价的。在本文中，我们提出了校准利普希茨保证金损失（CLL）来解决这个问题，并通过解决两个问题来提高认证的鲁棒性：首先，常用的保证金损失不会调整对缩小的产出分布的惩罚；由最小化 Lipschitz 常数 $K$ 引起。其次，也是最重要的，我们观察到 $K$ 的最小化可能会导致决策函数过于平滑。这限制了模型的复杂性，从而降低了准确性。我们的 CLL 通过明确校准损失 w.r.t 来解决这些问题。边际和 Lipschitz 常数，从而建立对松弛的完全控制，并提高鲁棒性证书，即使具有较大的 Lipschitz 常数。在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，我们的模型始终优于无人看管常数的损失。在 CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，CLL 改进了最先进的确定性 $L_2$ 鲁棒精度。与当前趋势相反，我们在没有 $K=1$ 约束的情况下释放了更小的模型的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种校准 Lipschitz 边距损失（CLL），以提高分类器在较大 Lipschitz 常数下的认证鲁棒性，同时保持高准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于 Lipschitz 约束的鲁棒性方法需最小化 Lipschitz 常数 K，但会导致输出分布收缩、决策函数过度平滑，从而显著降低准确率；同时常用边距损失未能根据不同 K 调整惩罚。
AI.method: 提出 Calibrated Lipschitz-Margin Loss（CLL），通过显式校准损失函数中的边距和 Lipschitz 常数，建立对松弛量的完全控制，从而允许使用更大的 Lipschitz 常数来维持模型复杂度。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，CLL 始终优于不考虑 Lipschitz 常数的损失函数；在 CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上达到了最先进的确定性 L2 鲁棒准确率。
AI.conclusion: CLL 通过校准边距与 Lipschitz 常数，能够在较小模型上不使用 K=1 约束即可获得更强的认证鲁棒性，打破了当前趋势对大型模型和严格 Lipschitz 约束的依赖。

ai_content_json.result: 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，CLL 始终优于不考虑 Lipschitz 常数的损失函数；在 CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上达到了最先进的确定性 L2 鲁棒准确率。
ai_content_json.conclusion: CLL 通过校准边距与 Lipschitz 常数，能够在较小模型上不使用 K=1 约束即可获得更强的认证鲁棒性，打破了当前趋势对大型模型和严格 Lipschitz 约束的依赖。

search_text: Certified Robust Models with Slack Control and Large Lipschitz Constants 具有松弛控制和大 Lipschitz 常数的经过认证的鲁棒模型 Despite recent success, state-of-the-art learning-based models remain highly vulnerable to input changes such as adversarial examples. In order to obtain certifiable robustness against such perturbations, recent work considers Lipschitz-based regularizers or constraints while at the same time increasing prediction margin. Unfortunately, this comes at the cost of significantly decreased accuracy. In this paper, we propose a Calibrated Lipschitz-Margin Loss (CLL) that addresses this issue and improves certified robustness by tackling two problems: Firstly, commonly used margin losses do not adjust the penalties to the shrinking output distribution; caused by minimizing the Lipschitz constant $K$. Secondly, and most importantly, we observe that minimization of $K$ can lead to overly smooth decision functions. This limits the model's complexity and thus reduces accuracy. Our CLL addresses these issues by explicitly calibrating the loss w.r.t. margin and Lipschitz constant, thereby establishing full control over slack and improving robustness certificates even with larger Lipschitz constants. On CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, our models consistently outperform losses that leave the constant unattended. On CIFAR-100 and Tiny-ImageNet, CLL improves upon state-of-the-art deterministic $L_2$ robust accuracies. In contrast to current trends, we unlock potential of much smaller models without $K=1$ constraints. 尽管最近取得了成功，但最先进的基于学习的模型仍然非常容易受到输入变化（例如对抗性示例）的影响。为了获得针对此类扰动的可证明的鲁棒性，最近的工作考虑了基于 Lipschitz 的正则化器或约束，同时增加了预测裕度。不幸的是，这是以显着降低准确性为代价的。在本文中，我们提出了校准利普希茨保证金损失（CLL）来解决这个问题，并通过解决两个问题来提高认证的鲁棒性：首先，常用的保证金损失不会调整对缩小的产出分布的惩罚；由最小化 Lipschitz 常数 $K$ 引起。其次，也是最重要的，我们观察到 $K$ 的最小化可能会导致决策函数过于平滑。这限制了模型的复杂性，从而降低了准确性。我们的 CLL 通过明确校准损失 w.r.t 来解决这些问题。边际和 Lipschitz 常数，从而建立对松弛的完全控制，并提高鲁棒性证书，即使具有较大的 Lipschitz 常数。在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，我们的模型始终优于无人看管常数的损失。在 CIFAR-100 和 Tiny-ImageNet 上，CLL 改进了最先进的确定性 $L_2$ 鲁棒精度。与当前趋势相反，我们在没有 $K=1$ 约束的情况下释放了更小的模型的潜力。 提出一种校准 Lipschitz 边距损失（CLL），以提高分类器在较大 Lipschitz 常数下的认证鲁棒性，同时保持高准确率。 Max Losch,David Stutz,Bernt Schiele,Mario Fritz cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: Humphrey O. Obie,Juliet Ukwella,Kashumi Madampe,John Grundy,Mojtaba Shahin
title: Towards an Understanding of Developers' Perceptions of Transparency in Software Development: A Preliminary Study
title_zh: 了解开发人员对软件开发透明度的看法：初步研究
comment: 2023 Workshop on Human Centric Software Engineering and Cyber Security
comments: 2023 Workshop on Human Centric Software Engineering and Cyber Security
abstract: Software applications play an increasingly critical role in various aspects of our lives, from communication and entertainment to business and healthcare. As these applications become more pervasive, the importance of considering human values in software development has gained significant attention. In this preliminary study, we investigate developers's perceptions and experiences related to human values, with a focus on the human value of transparency. We interviewed five experienced developers and conducted thematic analysis to explore how developers perceive transparency, violations of transparency, and the process of fixing reported violations of transparency. Our findings reveal the significance of transparency as a fundamental value in software development, with developers recognising its importance for building trust, promoting accountability, and fostering ethical practices. Developers recognise the negative consequences of the violation of the human value of transparency and follow a systematic process to fix reported violations. This includes investigation, root cause analysis, corrective action planning, collaborative problem-solving, and testing and verification. These preliminary findings contribute to the understanding of transparency in software development and provide insights for promoting ethical practices.
summary: Software applications play an increasingly critical role in various aspects of our lives, from communication and entertainment to business and healthcare. As these applications become more pervasive, the importance of considering human values in software development has gained significant attention. In this preliminary study, we investigate developers's perceptions and experiences related to human values, with a focus on the human value of transparency. We interviewed five experienced developers and conducted thematic analysis to explore how developers perceive transparency, violations of transparency, and the process of fixing reported violations of transparency. Our findings reveal the significance of transparency as a fundamental value in software development, with developers recognising its importance for building trust, promoting accountability, and fostering ethical practices. Developers recognise the negative consequences of the violation of the human value of transparency and follow a systematic process to fix reported violations. This includes investigation, root cause analysis, corrective action planning, collaborative problem-solving, and testing and verification. These preliminary findings contribute to the understanding of transparency in software development and provide insights for promoting ethical practices.
abstract_zh: 软件应用程序在我们生活的各个方面发挥着越来越重要的作用，从通信和娱乐到商业和医疗保健。随着这些应用程序变得越来越普遍，在软件开发中考虑人类价值观的重要性已经引起了人们的广泛关注。在这项初步研究中，我们调查了开发人员对人类价值观的看法和经验，重点关注透明度的人类价值。我们采访了五位经验丰富的开发者，并进行了主题分析，以探讨开发者如何看待透明度、违反透明度的行为以及修复报告的违反透明度的过程。我们的研究结果揭示了透明度作为软件开发中基本价值的重要性，开发人员认识到透明度对于建立信任、促进问责制和培养道德实践的重要性。开发人员认识到违反透明度的人类价值的负面后果，并遵循系统流程来修复报告的违规行为。这包括调查、根本原因分析、纠正行动计划、协作解决问题以及测试和验证。这些初步发现有助于理解软件开发的透明度，并为促进道德实践提供见解。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在初步探索开发者对软件开发中透明度这一人类价值的感知、体验以及修复透明度违规行为的过程。
AI.motivation: 随着软件应用在人们生活中越来越重要，人类价值（如透明度）在软件开发中的重要性日益凸显，但目前对开发者如何看待和理解透明度的研究还很有限，因此需要开展这项初步研究。
AI.method: 采用半结构化访谈法，访谈了五位经验丰富的开发者，并对访谈数据进行主题分析，以挖掘开发者对透明度及其违规修复过程的认知。
AI.result: 开发者认识到透明度是软件开发中的基本价值，对建立信任、促进问责和推动道德实践至关重要；开发者了解违反透明度的负面后果，并遵循系统化的流程（包括调查、根因分析、纠正措施规划、协作解决问题以及测试和验证）来修复报告的透明度违规问题。
AI.conclusion: 这些初步发现增进了对软件开发中透明度的理解，并为在开发实践中推广道德规范提供了有价值的见解。

authors_text: Tuan Pham Minh,Jayan Wijesingha,Daniel Kottke,Marek Herde,Denis Huseljic,Bernhard Sick,Michael Wachendorf,Thomas Esch
title: Active Label Refinement for Semantic Segmentation of Satellite Images
title_zh: 卫星图像语义分割的主动标签细化
abstract: Remote sensing through semantic segmentation of satellite images contributes to the understanding and utilisation of the earth's surface. For this purpose, semantic segmentation networks are typically trained on large sets of labelled satellite images. However, obtaining expert labels for these images is costly. Therefore, we propose to rely on a low-cost approach, e.g. crowdsourcing or pretrained networks, to label the images in the first step. Since these initial labels are partially erroneous, we use active learning strategies to cost-efficiently refine the labels in the second step. We evaluate the active learning strategies using satellite images of Bengaluru in India, labelled with land cover and land use labels. Our experimental results suggest that an active label refinement to improve the semantic segmentation network's performance is beneficial.
summary: Remote sensing through semantic segmentation of satellite images contributes to the understanding and utilisation of the earth's surface. For this purpose, semantic segmentation networks are typically trained on large sets of labelled satellite images. However, obtaining expert labels for these images is costly. Therefore, we propose to rely on a low-cost approach, e.g. crowdsourcing or pretrained networks, to label the images in the first step. Since these initial labels are partially erroneous, we use active learning strategies to cost-efficiently refine the labels in the second step. We evaluate the active learning strategies using satellite images of Bengaluru in India, labelled with land cover and land use labels. Our experimental results suggest that an active label refinement to improve the semantic segmentation network's performance is beneficial.
abstract_zh: 通过卫星图像语义分割进行遥感有助于了解和利用地球表面。为此，语义分割网络通常在大量带标签的卫星图像上进行训练。然而，为这些图像获取专家标签的成本很高。因此，我们建议依靠低成本的方法，例如众包或预训练网络，在第一步中标记图像。由于这些初始标签有部分错误，因此我们在第二步中使用主动学习策略来经济高效地完善标签。我们使用印度班加罗尔的卫星图像评估主动学习策略，并标有土地覆盖和土地利用标签。我们的实验结果表明，主动标签细化对于提高语义分割网络的性能是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种主动标签精炼方法，用于在低成本的初始标注（如众包或预训练网络）基础上，通过主动学习策略高效修正卫星图像语义分割中的错误标签。
AI.motivation: 获取卫星图像的专业标注成本高昂，而低成本标注方式（如众包或预训练网络）产生的标签存在较多错误，因此需要一种成本高效的方法来精炼这些标签，以提升语义分割网络的性能。
AI.method: 采用两阶段流程：第一阶段通过低成本方式（众包或预训练网络）获取初始标签；第二阶段利用主动学习策略，有选择性地对最不确定或最具信息量的样本进行人工精炼，从而在有限预算下高效修正错误标签。
AI.result: 在印度班加罗尔的卫星图像（含土地覆盖和土地利用标签）上进行的实验表明，主动标签精炼能够有效提升语义分割网络的性能。
AI.conclusion: 主动标签精炼是一种有益的方法，能够以低成本的方式改善语义分割网络在卫星图像上的表现。

tldr: 本文提出了一种主动标签精炼方法，用于在低成本的初始标注（如众包或预训练网络）基础上，通过主动学习策略高效修正卫星图像语义分割中的错误标签。
motivation: 获取卫星图像的专业标注成本高昂，而低成本标注方式（如众包或预训练网络）产生的标签存在较多错误，因此需要一种成本高效的方法来精炼这些标签，以提升语义分割网络的性能。
method: 采用两阶段流程：第一阶段通过低成本方式（众包或预训练网络）获取初始标签；第二阶段利用主动学习策略，有选择性地对最不确定或最具信息量的样本进行人工精炼，从而在有限预算下高效修正错误标签。
result: 在印度班加罗尔的卫星图像（含土地覆盖和土地利用标签）上进行的实验表明，主动标签精炼能够有效提升语义分割网络的性能。
conclusion: 主动标签精炼是一种有益的方法，能够以低成本的方式改善语义分割网络在卫星图像上的表现。
search_text: Active Label Refinement for Semantic Segmentation of Satellite Images 卫星图像语义分割的主动标签细化 Remote sensing through semantic segmentation of satellite images contributes to the understanding and utilisation of the earth's surface. For this purpose, semantic segmentation networks are typically trained on large sets of labelled satellite images. However, obtaining expert labels for these images is costly. Therefore, we propose to rely on a low-cost approach, e.g. crowdsourcing or pretrained networks, to label the images in the first step. Since these initial labels are partially erroneous, we use active learning strategies to cost-efficiently refine the labels in the second step. We evaluate the active learning strategies using satellite images of Bengaluru in India, labelled with land cover and land use labels. Our experimental results suggest that an active label refinement to improve the semantic segmentation network's performance is beneficial. 通过卫星图像语义分割进行遥感有助于了解和利用地球表面。为此，语义分割网络通常在大量带标签的卫星图像上进行训练。然而，为这些图像获取专家标签的成本很高。因此，我们建议依靠低成本的方法，例如众包或预训练网络，在第一步中标记图像。由于这些初始标签有部分错误，因此我们在第二步中使用主动学习策略来经济高效地完善标签。我们使用印度班加罗尔的卫星图像评估主动学习策略，并标有土地覆盖和土地利用标签。我们的实验结果表明，主动标签细化对于提高语义分割网络的性能是有益的。 本文提出了一种主动标签精炼方法，用于在低成本的初始标注（如众包或预训练网络）基础上，通过主动学习策略高效修正卫星图像语义分割中的错误标签。 Tuan Pham Minh,Jayan Wijesingha,Daniel Kottke,Marek Herde,Denis Huseljic,Bernhard Sick,Michael Wachendorf,Thomas Esch cs.CV

authors_text: Khoa Tran,Hai-Canh Vu,Lam Pham,Nassim Boudaoud
title: Robust-MBDL: A Robust Multi-branch Deep Learning Based Model for Remaining Useful Life Prediction and Operational Condition Identification of Rotating Machines
title_zh: Robust-MBDL：一种基于多分支深度学习的鲁棒模型，用于旋转机械的剩余使用寿命预测和运行状况识别
abstract: In this paper, a Robust Multi-branch Deep learning-based system for remaining useful life (RUL) prediction and condition operations (CO) identification of rotating machines is proposed. In particular, the proposed system comprises main components: (1) an LSTM-Autoencoder to denoise the vibration data; (2) a feature extraction to generate time-domain, frequency-domain, and time-frequency based features from the denoised data; (3) a novel and robust multi-branch deep learning network architecture to exploit the multiple features. The performance of our proposed system was evaluated and compared to the state-of-the-art systems on two benchmark datasets of XJTU-SY and PRONOSTIA. The experimental results prove that our proposed system outperforms the state-of-the-art systems and presents potential for real-life applications on bearing machines.
summary: In this paper, a Robust Multi-branch Deep learning-based system for remaining useful life (RUL) prediction and condition operations (CO) identification of rotating machines is proposed. In particular, the proposed system comprises main components: (1) an LSTM-Autoencoder to denoise the vibration data; (2) a feature extraction to generate time-domain, frequency-domain, and time-frequency based features from the denoised data; (3) a novel and robust multi-branch deep learning network architecture to exploit the multiple features. The performance of our proposed system was evaluated and compared to the state-of-the-art systems on two benchmark datasets of XJTU-SY and PRONOSTIA. The experimental results prove that our proposed system outperforms the state-of-the-art systems and presents potential for real-life applications on bearing machines.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒多分支深度学习的系统，用于旋转机器的剩余使用寿命（RUL）预测和状态操作（CO）识别。具体来说，所提出的系统包括主要组件：（1）LSTM自动编码器，用于对振动数据进行降噪； (2)特征提取以从去噪数据生成时域、频域和基于时频的特征； （3）一种新颖且鲁棒的多分支深度学习网络架构，以利用多种特征。在 XJTU-SY 和 PRONOSTIA 两个基准数据集上对我们提出的系统的性能进行了评估，并与最先进的系统进行了比较。实验结果证明，我们提出的系统优于最先进的系统，并具有在轴承机器上实际应用的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于鲁棒多分支深度学习的旋转机械剩余使用寿命预测与运行工况识别系统
AI.motivation: 旋转机械的剩余使用寿命预测和运行工况识别对工业维护至关重要，现有方法在处理噪声数据和多特征融合方面存在不足，亟需一种鲁棒且高效的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 系统由三部分组成：(1) LSTM-自编码器对振动数据进行降噪；(2) 从降噪数据中提取时域、频域和时频域特征；(3) 新颖的鲁棒多分支深度学习网络架构利用多种特征进行预测和识别。
AI.result: 在XJTU-SY和PRONOSTIA两个基准数据集上的实验结果表明，所提系统优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的鲁棒多分支深度学习系统在旋转轴承机器的剩余使用寿命预测和工况识别方面表现优异，具有实际工业应用潜力。

authors_text: Amirreza Mahbod,Georg Dorffner,Isabella Ellinger,Ramona Woitek,Sepideh Hatamikia
title: Improving Generalization Capability of Deep Learning-Based Nuclei Instance Segmentation by Non-deterministic Train Time and Deterministic Test Time Stain Normalization
title_zh: 通过非确定性训练时间和确定性测试时间污点归一化提高基于深度学习的核实例分割的泛化能力
comment: Accepted at Computational and Structural Biotechnology Journal
comments: Accepted at Computational and Structural Biotechnology Journal
abstract: With the advent of digital pathology and microscopic systems that can scan and save whole slide histological images automatically, there is a growing trend to use computerized methods to analyze acquired images. Among different histopathological image analysis tasks, nuclei instance segmentation plays a fundamental role in a wide range of clinical and research applications. While many semi- and fully-automatic computerized methods have been proposed for nuclei instance segmentation, deep learning (DL)-based approaches have been shown to deliver the best performances. However, the performance of such approaches usually degrades when tested on unseen datasets. In this work, we propose a novel method to improve the generalization capability of a DL-based automatic segmentation approach. Besides utilizing one of the state-of-the-art DL-based models as a baseline, our method incorporates non-deterministic train time and deterministic test time stain normalization, and ensembling to boost the segmentation performance. We trained the model with one single training set and evaluated its segmentation performance on seven test datasets. Our results show that the proposed method provides up to 4.9%, 5.4%, and 5.9% better average performance in segmenting nuclei based on Dice score, aggregated Jaccard index, and panoptic quality score, respectively, compared to the baseline segmentation model.
summary: With the advent of digital pathology and microscopic systems that can scan and save whole slide histological images automatically, there is a growing trend to use computerized methods to analyze acquired images. Among different histopathological image analysis tasks, nuclei instance segmentation plays a fundamental role in a wide range of clinical and research applications. While many semi- and fully-automatic computerized methods have been proposed for nuclei instance segmentation, deep learning (DL)-based approaches have been shown to deliver the best performances. However, the performance of such approaches usually degrades when tested on unseen datasets. In this work, we propose a novel method to improve the generalization capability of a DL-based automatic segmentation approach. Besides utilizing one of the state-of-the-art DL-based models as a baseline, our method incorporates non-deterministic train time and deterministic test time stain normalization, and ensembling to boost the segmentation performance. We trained the model with one single training set and evaluated its segmentation performance on seven test datasets. Our results show that the proposed method provides up to 4.9%, 5.4%, and 5.9% better average performance in segmenting nuclei based on Dice score, aggregated Jaccard index, and panoptic quality score, respectively, compared to the baseline segmentation model.
abstract_zh: 随着数字病理学和可以自动扫描和保存整个载玻片组织学图像的显微系统的出现，使用计算机方法分析获取的图像的趋势日益增长。在不同的组织病理学图像分析任务中，细胞核实例分割在广泛的临床和研究应用中发挥着基础作用。虽然已经提出了许多半自动和全自动计算机化方法用于核实例分割，但基于深度学习 (DL) 的方法已被证明可以提供最佳性能。然而，在未见过的数据集上进行测试时，此类方法的性能通常会下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来提高基于深度学习的自动分割方法的泛化能力。除了利用最先进的基于深度学习的模型之一作为基线之外，我们的方法还结合了非确定性训练时间和确定性测试时间染色归一化以及集成来提高分割性能。我们使用一个训练集训练该模型，并在七个测试数据集上评估其分割性能。我们的结果表明，与基线分割模型相比，所提出的方法在基于 Dice 评分、聚合 Jaccard 指数和全景质量评分的细胞核分割方面的平均性能分别提高了 4.9%、5.4% 和 5.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合非确定性训练时与确定性测试时染色归一化及集成学习的方法，以提高深度学习细胞核实例分割模型在未见数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在细胞核实例分割任务中表现优异，但面对未见数据集时性能显著下降，亟需提升模型的泛化能力以应对实际应用中的跨数据集场景。
AI.method: 以先进的深度学习分割模型为基础，在训练阶段引入非确定性染色归一化（随机颜色扰动），在测试阶段使用确定性染色归一化（固定颜色标准化），并结合多个模型的集成策略，最终提升分割性能。
AI.result: 在单一训练集上训练，在七个测试集上评估，相比基线模型，Dice分数、聚合Jaccard指数和全景质量分数分别平均提升4.9%、5.4%和5.9%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法的染色归一化和集成策略能有效提升深度学习细胞核实例分割模型对未见数据集的泛化能力。

Our results show that the proposed method provides up to 4.9%, 5.4%, and 5.9% better average performance in segmenting nuclei based on Dice score, aggregated Jaccard index, and panoptic quality score, respectively, compared to the baseline segmentation model. 随着数字病理学和可以自动扫描和保存整个载玻片组织学图像的显微系统的出现，使用计算机方法分析获取的图像的趋势日益增长。在不同的组织病理学图像分析任务中，细胞核实例分割在广泛的临床和研究应用中发挥着基础作用。虽然已经提出了许多半自动和全自动计算机化方法用于核实例分割，但基于深度学习 (DL) 的方法已被证明可以提供最佳性能。然而，在未见过的数据集上进行测试时，此类方法的性能通常会下降。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法来提高基于深度学习的自动分割方法的泛化能力。除了利用最先进的基于深度学习的模型之一作为基线之外，我们的方法还结合了非确定性训练时间和确定性测试时间染色归一化以及集成来提高分割性能。我们使用一个训练集训练该模型，并在七个测试数据集上评估其分割性能。我们的结果表明，与基线分割模型相比，所提出的方法在基于 Dice 评分、聚合 Jaccard 指数和全景质量评分的细胞核分割方面的平均性能分别提高了 4.9%、5.4% 和 5.9%。 本文提出一种结合非确定性训练时与确定性测试时染色归一化及集成学习的方法，以提高深度学习细胞核实例分割模型在未见数据集上的泛化能力。 Amirreza Mahbod,Georg Dorffner,Isabella Ellinger,Ramona Woitek,Sepideh Hatamikia eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiao Zhang,Xu-Yao Zhang,Cheng-Lin Liu
title: Towards Reliable Domain Generalization: A New Dataset and Evaluations
title_zh: 迈向可靠的领域泛化：新的数据集和评估
abstract: There are ubiquitous distribution shifts in the real world. However, deep neural networks (DNNs) are easily biased towards the training set, which causes severe performance degradation when they receive out-of-distribution data. Many methods are studied to train models that generalize under various distribution shifts in the literature of domain generalization (DG). However, the recent DomainBed and WILDS benchmarks challenged the effectiveness of these methods. Aiming at the problems in the existing research, we propose a new domain generalization task for handwritten Chinese character recognition (HCCR) to enrich the application scenarios of DG method research. We evaluate eighteen DG methods on the proposed PaHCC (Printed and Handwritten Chinese Characters) dataset and show that the performance of existing methods on this dataset is still unsatisfactory. Besides, under a designed dynamic DG setting, we reveal more properties of DG methods and argue that only the leave-one-domain-out protocol is unreliable. We advocate that researchers in the DG community refer to dynamic performance of methods for more comprehensive and reliable evaluation. Our dataset and evaluations bring new perspectives to the community for more substantial progress. We will make our dataset public with the article published to facilitate the study of domain generalization.
summary: There are ubiquitous distribution shifts in the real world. However, deep neural networks (DNNs) are easily biased towards the training set, which causes severe performance degradation when they receive out-of-distribution data. Many methods are studied to train models that generalize under various distribution shifts in the literature of domain generalization (DG). However, the recent DomainBed and WILDS benchmarks challenged the effectiveness of these methods. Aiming at the problems in the existing research, we propose a new domain generalization task for handwritten Chinese character recognition (HCCR) to enrich the application scenarios of DG method research. We evaluate eighteen DG methods on the proposed PaHCC (Printed and Handwritten Chinese Characters) dataset and show that the performance of existing methods on this dataset is still unsatisfactory. Besides, under a designed dynamic DG setting, we reveal more properties of DG methods and argue that only the leave-one-domain-out protocol is unreliable. We advocate that researchers in the DG community refer to dynamic performance of methods for more comprehensive and reliable evaluation. Our dataset and evaluations bring new perspectives to the community for more substantial progress. We will make our dataset public with the article published to facilitate the study of domain generalization.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中普遍存在分布变化。然而，深度神经网络（DNN）很容易偏向训练集，这会在接收到分布外数据时导致性能严重下降。领域泛化（DG）文献中研究了许多方法来训练在各种分布变化下泛化的模型。然而，最近的 DomainBed 和 WILDS 基准测试对这些方法的有效性提出了挑战。针对现有研究中的问题，我们提出了一种新的手写汉字识别（HCCR）领域泛化任务，以丰富DG方法研究的应用场景。我们在所提出的 PaHCC（印刷和手写汉字）数据集上评估了 18 种 DG 方法，结果表明现有方法在该数据集上的性能仍然不能令人满意。此外，在设计的动态 DG 设置下，我们揭示了 DG 方法的更多属性，并认为只有留一域协议是不可靠的。我们主张DG社区的研究人员参考方法的动态性能来进行更全面、更可靠的评估。我们的数据集和评估为社区带来了新的视角，以取得更大的进展。我们将通过发表的文章公开我们的数据集，以促进领域泛化的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个新的领域泛化任务——手写中文汉字识别（HCCR），并构建了PaHCC数据集，用于评估现有领域泛化方法在该任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化方法在实际应用中效果不佳，DomainBed和WILDS基准测试挑战了这些方法的有效性；同时现有领域泛化研究缺乏多样化的应用场景，特别是汉字识别领域尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了PaHCC（印刷体和手写中文汉字）数据集，在该数据集上评估了18种领域泛化方法，并设计了动态领域泛化设置，考察方法在不同分布偏移下的性能变化。
AI.result: 现有18种领域泛化方法在PaHCC数据集上的表现仍不理想；动态DG设置揭示了更多方法特性，表明仅使用留一法协议不可靠。
AI.conclusion: 建议领域泛化社区在评估方法时参考动态性能指标，以获得更全面可靠的评价；PaHCC数据集和新的评估视角有助于推动领域泛化研究的实质性进展。

authors_text: Xiaoxiao Miao,Xin Wang,Erica Cooper,Junichi Yamagishi,Nicholas Evans,Massimiliano Todisco,Jean-François Bonastre,Mickael Rouvier
title: SynVox2: Towards a privacy-friendly VoxCeleb2 dataset
title_zh: SynVox2：迈向隐私友好的 VoxCeleb2 数据集
abstract: The success of deep learning in speaker recognition relies heavily on the use of large datasets. However, the data-hungry nature of deep learning methods has already being questioned on account the ethical, privacy, and legal concerns that arise when using large-scale datasets of natural speech collected from real human speakers. For example, the widely-used VoxCeleb2 dataset for speaker recognition is no longer accessible from the official website. To mitigate these concerns, this work presents an initiative to generate a privacy-friendly synthetic VoxCeleb2 dataset that ensures the quality of the generated speech in terms of privacy, utility, and fairness. We also discuss the challenges of using synthetic data for the downstream task of speaker verification.
summary: The success of deep learning in speaker recognition relies heavily on the use of large datasets. However, the data-hungry nature of deep learning methods has already being questioned on account the ethical, privacy, and legal concerns that arise when using large-scale datasets of natural speech collected from real human speakers. For example, the widely-used VoxCeleb2 dataset for speaker recognition is no longer accessible from the official website. To mitigate these concerns, this work presents an initiative to generate a privacy-friendly synthetic VoxCeleb2 dataset that ensures the quality of the generated speech in terms of privacy, utility, and fairness. We also discuss the challenges of using synthetic data for the downstream task of speaker verification.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在说话人识别方面的成功在很大程度上依赖于大型数据集的使用。然而，由于使用从真实人类说话者收集的大规模自然语音数据集时出现的伦理、隐私和法律问题，深度学习方法对数据的渴求性质已经受到质疑。例如，广泛使用的用于说话人识别的 VoxCeleb2 数据集无法再从官方网站访问。为了减轻这些担忧，这项工作提出了生成隐私友好的合成 VoxCeleb2 数据集的举措，该数据集可确保生成的语音在隐私、实用性和公平性方面的质量。我们还讨论了使用合成数据进行说话人验证下游任务的挑战。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了SynVox2，旨在生成一个隐私友好的合成VoxCeleb2数据集，用于说话人识别任务。
AI.motivation: 原始VoxCeleb2数据集因涉及真实人类语音的伦理、隐私和法律问题，已无法从官方渠道获取。为了解决这些隐私和安全顾虑，同时保持数据集在大规模说话人识别中的可用性，作者提出了生成合成数据集的方案。
AI.method: 通过合成语音技术生成一个替代真实语音的VoxCeleb2数据集，在生成过程中关注隐私保护、数据效用和公平性三个方面的质量保证。
AI.result: 成功生成了一个隐私友好的合成VoxCeleb2数据集，并讨论了下游说话人验证任务中使用合成数据所面临的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据集可以在一定程度上缓解隐私问题，但将其用于说话人验证等下游任务仍存在挑战，需要进一步研究。

authors_text: Zhi-Yi Chin,Chieh-Ming Jiang,Ching-Chun Huang,Pin-Yu Chen,Wei-Chen Chiu
title: Prompting4Debugging: Red-Teaming Text-to-Image Diffusion Models by Finding Problematic Prompts
title_zh: Prompting4Debugging：通过查找有问题的提示来红队文本到图像扩散模型
comment: ICML 2024 main conference paper. The source code is available at https://github.com/zhiyichin/P4D
comments: ICML 2024 main conference paper. The source code is available at https://github.com/zhiyichin/P4D
abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models, e.g. Stable Diffusion (SD), lately have shown remarkable ability in high-quality content generation, and become one of the representatives for the recent wave of transformative AI. Nevertheless, such advance comes with an intensifying concern about the misuse of this generative technology, especially for producing copyrighted or NSFW (i.e. not safe for work) images. Although efforts have been made to filter inappropriate images/prompts or remove undesirable concepts/styles via model fine-tuning, the reliability of these safety mechanisms against diversified problematic prompts remains largely unexplored. In this work, we propose Prompting4Debugging (P4D) as a debugging and red-teaming tool that automatically finds problematic prompts for diffusion models to test the reliability of a deployed safety mechanism. We demonstrate the efficacy of our P4D tool in uncovering new vulnerabilities of SD models with safety mechanisms. Particularly, our result shows that around half of prompts in existing safe prompting benchmarks which were originally considered "safe" can actually be manipulated to bypass many deployed safety mechanisms, including concept removal, negative prompt, and safety guidance. Our findings suggest that, without comprehensive testing, the evaluations on limited safe prompting benchmarks can lead to a false sense of safety for text-to-image models.
summary: Text-to-image diffusion models, e.g. Stable Diffusion (SD), lately have shown remarkable ability in high-quality content generation, and become one of the representatives for the recent wave of transformative AI. Nevertheless, such advance comes with an intensifying concern about the misuse of this generative technology, especially for producing copyrighted or NSFW (i.e. not safe for work) images. Although efforts have been made to filter inappropriate images/prompts or remove undesirable concepts/styles via model fine-tuning, the reliability of these safety mechanisms against diversified problematic prompts remains largely unexplored. In this work, we propose Prompting4Debugging (P4D) as a debugging and red-teaming tool that automatically finds problematic prompts for diffusion models to test the reliability of a deployed safety mechanism. We demonstrate the efficacy of our P4D tool in uncovering new vulnerabilities of SD models with safety mechanisms. Particularly, our result shows that around half of prompts in existing safe prompting benchmarks which were originally considered "safe" can actually be manipulated to bypass many deployed safety mechanisms, including concept removal, negative prompt, and safety guidance. Our findings suggest that, without comprehensive testing, the evaluations on limited safe prompting benchmarks can lead to a false sense of safety for text-to-image models.
abstract_zh: 文本到图像的扩散模型，例如Stable Diffusion（SD）最近在高质量内容生成方面表现出了卓越的能力，成为最近变革性人工智能浪潮的代表之一。然而，这种进步伴随着人们对滥用这种生成技术的日益担忧，特别是用于制作受版权保护或 NSFW（即对工作不安全）图像。尽管已经努力通过模型微调来过滤不适当的图像/提示或删除不需要的概念/风格，但这些安全机制针对多样化问题提示的可靠性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这项工作中，我们提出 Prompting4Debugging (P4D) 作为一种调试和红队工具，可以自动查找扩散模型的有问题的提示，以测试已部署安全机制的可靠性。我们展示了 P4D 工具在发现具有安全机制的 SD 模型的新漏洞方面的功效。特别是，我们的结果表明，现有安全提示基准中大约一半的最初被认为是“安全”的提示实际上可以被操纵以绕过许多已部署的安全机制，包括概念删除、负面提示和安全指导。我们的研究结果表明，如果没有全面的测试，对有限的安全提示基准的评估可能会导致文本到图像模型的错误安全感。

AI.tldr: 提出Prompting4Debugging（P4D）工具，自动寻找能绕过文本到图像扩散模型安全机制的"问题提示词"，以测试和揭露现有安全机制的漏洞。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有过滤不当图像/提示词或通过模型微调去除不良概念/风格的安全机制，但这些机制在面对多样化的问题提示词时的可靠性仍未被充分探索，存在被绕过生成侵权或NSFW内容的风险。
AI.method: 设计了一种自动化红队测试工具P4D，通过自动搜索和生成能够绕过安全机制（如概念移除、负面提示、安全引导）的问题提示词，对部署了安全机制的Stable Diffusion模型进行漏洞测试。
AI.result: 发现现有安全提示基准中约一半原本被认为是"安全"的提示词，实际上可以被操纵绕过多种安全机制，包括概念移除、负面提示和安全引导。
AI.conclusion: 如果没有全面的测试，仅依赖有限的基准评测会给文本到图像模型带来虚假的安全感，现有安全机制存在严重漏洞，需要更严谨的测试方法。

search_text: Prompting4Debugging: Red-Teaming Text-to-Image Diffusion Models by Finding Problematic Prompts Prompting4Debugging：通过查找有问题的提示来红队文本到图像扩散模型 Text-to-image diffusion models, e.g. Stable Diffusion (SD), lately have shown remarkable ability in high-quality content generation, and become one of the representatives for the recent wave of transformative AI. Nevertheless, such advance comes with an intensifying concern about the misuse of this generative technology, especially for producing copyrighted or NSFW (i.e. not safe for work) images. Although efforts have been made to filter inappropriate images/prompts or remove undesirable concepts/styles via model fine-tuning, the reliability of these safety mechanisms against diversified problematic prompts remains largely unexplored. In this work, we propose Prompting4Debugging (P4D) as a debugging and red-teaming tool that automatically finds problematic prompts for diffusion models to test the reliability of a deployed safety mechanism. We demonstrate the efficacy of our P4D tool in uncovering new vulnerabilities of SD models with safety mechanisms. Particularly, our result shows that around half of prompts in existing safe prompting benchmarks which were originally considered "safe" can actually be manipulated to bypass many deployed safety mechanisms, including concept removal, negative prompt, and safety guidance. Our findings suggest that, without comprehensive testing, the evaluations on limited safe prompting benchmarks can lead to a false sense of safety for text-to-image models. 文本到图像的扩散模型，例如Stable Diffusion（SD）最近在高质量内容生成方面表现出了卓越的能力，成为最近变革性人工智能浪潮的代表之一。然而，这种进步伴随着人们对滥用这种生成技术的日益担忧，特别是用于制作受版权保护或 NSFW（即对工作不安全）图像。尽管已经努力通过模型微调来过滤不适当的图像/提示或删除不需要的概念/风格，但这些安全机制针对多样化问题提示的可靠性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这项工作中，我们提出 Prompting4Debugging (P4D) 作为一种调试和红队工具，可以自动查找扩散模型的有问题的提示，以测试已部署安全机制的可靠性。我们展示了 P4D 工具在发现具有安全机制的 SD 模型的新漏洞方面的功效。特别是，我们的结果表明，现有安全提示基准中大约一半的最初被认为是“安全”的提示实际上可以被操纵以绕过许多已部署的安全机制，包括概念删除、负面提示和安全指导。我们的研究结果表明，如果没有全面的测试，对有限的安全提示基准的评估可能会导致文本到图像模型的错误安全感。 提出Prompting4Debugging（P4D）工具，自动寻找能绕过文本到图像扩散模型安全机制的"问题提示词"，以测试和揭露现有安全机制的漏洞。 Zhi-Yi Chin,Chieh-Ming Jiang,Ching-Chun Huang,Pin-Yu Chen,Wei-Chen Chiu cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Benjamin Icard,Vincent Claveau,Ghislain Atemezing,Paul Égré
title: Measuring vagueness and subjectivity in texts: from symbolic to neural VAGO
title_zh: 测量文本中的模糊性和主观性：从符号到神经 VAGO
comment: Paper to appear in the Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Web Intelligence and Intelligent Agent Technology (WI-IAT)
comments: Paper to appear in the Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Web Intelligence and Intelligent Agent Technology (WI-IAT)
abstract: We present a hybrid approach to the automated measurement of vagueness and subjectivity in texts. We first introduce the expert system VAGO, we illustrate it on a small benchmark of fact vs. opinion sentences, and then test it on the larger French press corpus FreSaDa to confirm the higher prevalence of subjective markers in satirical vs. regular texts. We then build a neural clone of VAGO, based on a BERT-like architecture, trained on the symbolic VAGO scores obtained on FreSaDa. Using explainability tools (LIME), we show the interest of this neural version for the enrichment of the lexicons of the symbolic version, and for the production of versions in other languages.
summary: We present a hybrid approach to the automated measurement of vagueness and subjectivity in texts. We first introduce the expert system VAGO, we illustrate it on a small benchmark of fact vs. opinion sentences, and then test it on the larger French press corpus FreSaDa to confirm the higher prevalence of subjective markers in satirical vs. regular texts. We then build a neural clone of VAGO, based on a BERT-like architecture, trained on the symbolic VAGO scores obtained on FreSaDa. Using explainability tools (LIME), we show the interest of this neural version for the enrichment of the lexicons of the symbolic version, and for the production of versions in other languages.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种混合方法来自动测量文本中的模糊性和主观性。我们首先介绍专家系统 VAGO，我们在事实与观点句子的小基准上对其进行说明，然后在更大的法国新闻语料库 FreSaDa 上对其进行测试，以确认讽刺文本与常规文本中主观标记的普遍性更高。然后，我们基于类似 BERT 的架构构建了 VAGO 的神经克隆，并根据 FreSaDa 上获得的符号 VAGO 分数进行训练。使用可解释性工具（LIME），我们展示了该神经版本对于丰富符号版本的词汇以及生成其他语言版本的兴趣。

AI.tldr: 提出一种混合方法（从符号系统到神经网络）自动测量文本中的模糊性和主观性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以准确量化文本的模糊性与主观性，且现有工具在跨语言和词典丰富方面存在局限，需要一种结合符号系统可解释性与神经网络灵活性的混合方案。
AI.method: 先构建符号专家系统VAGO并在事实/观点句子基准及法语新闻语料库FreSaDa上测试；再基于BERT架构训练VAGO的神经克隆，使用LIME进行可解释性分析，并用神经网络结果丰富符号版本的词典并推广到其他语言。
AI.result: VAGO在事实与观点句的区分上有效，且在FreSaDa语料库中证实讽刺文本比常规文本含有更多主观性标记；神经克隆版本通过LIME展示了可解释性，并成功用于符号版本词典的扩充及多语言版本的生成。
AI.conclusion: 符号系统与神经网络结合的混合方法不仅能有效测量文本模糊性与主观性，还能借助神经网络的可解释性和迁移能力反向增强符号系统的词典覆盖和跨语言适用性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种混合方法（从符号系统到神经网络）自动测量文本中的模糊性和主观性。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法难以准确量化文本的模糊性与主观性，且现有工具在跨语言和词典丰富方面存在局限，需要一种结合符号系统可解释性与神经网络灵活性的混合方案。

authors_text: Mohammed Guermal,Francois Bremond,Rui Dai,Abid Ali
title: JOADAA: joint online action detection and action anticipation
title_zh: JOADAA：联合在线动作检测和动作预测
abstract: Action anticipation involves forecasting future actions by connecting past events to future ones. However, this reasoning ignores the real-life hierarchy of events which is considered to be composed of three main parts: past, present, and future. We argue that considering these three main parts and their dependencies could improve performance. On the other hand, online action detection is the task of predicting actions in a streaming manner. In this case, one has access only to the past and present information. Therefore, in online action detection (OAD) the existing approaches miss semantics or future information which limits their performance. To sum up, for both of these tasks, the complete set of knowledge (past-present-future) is missing, which makes it challenging to infer action dependencies, therefore having low performances. To address this limitation, we propose to fuse both tasks into a single uniform architecture. By combining action anticipation and online action detection, our approach can cover the missing dependencies of future information in online action detection. This method referred to as JOADAA, presents a uniform model that jointly performs action anticipation and online action detection. We validate our proposed model on three challenging datasets: THUMOS'14, which is a sparsely annotated dataset with one action per time step, CHARADES, and Multi-THUMOS, two densely annotated datasets with more complex scenarios. JOADAA achieves SOTA results on these benchmarks for both tasks.
summary: Action anticipation involves forecasting future actions by connecting past events to future ones. However, this reasoning ignores the real-life hierarchy of events which is considered to be composed of three main parts: past, present, and future. We argue that considering these three main parts and their dependencies could improve performance. On the other hand, online action detection is the task of predicting actions in a streaming manner. In this case, one has access only to the past and present information. Therefore, in online action detection (OAD) the existing approaches miss semantics or future information which limits their performance. To sum up, for both of these tasks, the complete set of knowledge (past-present-future) is missing, which makes it challenging to infer action dependencies, therefore having low performances. To address this limitation, we propose to fuse both tasks into a single uniform architecture. By combining action anticipation and online action detection, our approach can cover the missing dependencies of future information in online action detection. This method referred to as JOADAA, presents a uniform model that jointly performs action anticipation and online action detection. We validate our proposed model on three challenging datasets: THUMOS'14, which is a sparsely annotated dataset with one action per time step, CHARADES, and Multi-THUMOS, two densely annotated datasets with more complex scenarios. JOADAA achieves SOTA results on these benchmarks for both tasks.
abstract_zh: 行动预期涉及通过将过去的事件与未来的事件联系起来来预测未来的行动。然而，这种推理忽略了现实生活中事件的层次结构，它被认为由三个主要部分组成：过去、现在和未来。我们认为考虑这三个主要部分及其依赖性可以提高性能。另一方面，在线动作检测是以流方式预测动作的任务。在这种情况下，人们只能访问过去和现在的信息。因此，在在线动作检测（OAD）中，现有方法错过了语义或未来信息，这限制了它们的性能。综上所述，对于这两个任务，缺少完整的知识集（过去-现在-未来），这使得推断动作依赖关系具有挑战性，因此性能较低。为了解决这个限制，我们建议将这两个任务融合到一个统一的架构中。通过将动作预测和在线动作检测相结合，我们的方法可以覆盖在线动作检测中未来信息缺失的依赖关系。该方法称为 JOADAA，提出了联合执行动作预测和在线动作检测的统一模型。我们在三个具有挑战性的数据集上验证了我们提出的模型：THUMOS'14（每个时间步只有一个动作的稀疏注释数据集）、CHARADES 和 Multi-THUMOS（两个具有更复杂场景的密集注释数据集）。 JOADAA 在这两项任务的这些基准测试中均取得了 SOTA 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合在线动作检测与动作预测的统一框架JOADAA，同时解决两个任务中的信息缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动作预测任务忽略了"过去-现在-未来"的完整层次结构，而在线动作检测因只依赖过去和现在信息，缺乏未来语义，两者性能受限。通过融合两个任务可以弥补各自的依赖缺失。
AI.method: 提出JOADAA统一模型，将动作预测（利用未来信息）与在线动作检测（利用过去和现在信息）联合训练，通过共享表示学习覆盖完整的时间依赖关系。
AI.result: 在THUMOS'14、CHARADES和Multi-THUMOS三个数据集上，JOADAA在在线动作检测和动作预测两个任务上均达到了最先进（SOTA）的结果。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模在线动作检测和动作预测能够有效弥补各自缺失的时间依赖信息，提升两个任务的性能，验证了统一框架的有效性。

search_text: JOADAA: joint online action detection and action anticipation JOADAA：联合在线动作检测和动作预测 Action anticipation involves forecasting future actions by connecting past events to future ones. However, this reasoning ignores the real-life hierarchy of events which is considered to be composed of three main parts: past, present, and future. We argue that considering these three main parts and their dependencies could improve performance. On the other hand, online action detection is the task of predicting actions in a streaming manner. In this case, one has access only to the past and present information. Therefore, in online action detection (OAD) the existing approaches miss semantics or future information which limits their performance. To sum up, for both of these tasks, the complete set of knowledge (past-present-future) is missing, which makes it challenging to infer action dependencies, therefore having low performances. To address this limitation, we propose to fuse both tasks into a single uniform architecture. By combining action anticipation and online action detection, our approach can cover the missing dependencies of future information in online action detection. This method referred to as JOADAA, presents a uniform model that jointly performs action anticipation and online action detection. We validate our proposed model on three challenging datasets: THUMOS'14, which is a sparsely annotated dataset with one action per time step, CHARADES, and Multi-THUMOS, two densely annotated datasets with more complex scenarios. JOADAA achieves SOTA results on these benchmarks for both tasks. 行动预期涉及通过将过去的事件与未来的事件联系起来来预测未来的行动。然而，这种推理忽略了现实生活中事件的层次结构，它被认为由三个主要部分组成：过去、现在和未来。我们认为考虑这三个主要部分及其依赖性可以提高性能。另一方面，在线动作检测是以流方式预测动作的任务。在这种情况下，人们只能访问过去和现在的信息。因此，在在线动作检测（OAD）中，现有方法错过了语义或未来信息，这限制了它们的性能。综上所述，对于这两个任务，缺少完整的知识集（过去-现在-未来），这使得推断动作依赖关系具有挑战性，因此性能较低。为了解决这个限制，我们建议将这两个任务融合到一个统一的架构中。通过将动作预测和在线动作检测相结合，我们的方法可以覆盖在线动作检测中未来信息缺失的依赖关系。该方法称为 JOADAA，提出了联合执行动作预测和在线动作检测的统一模型。我们在三个具有挑战性的数据集上验证了我们提出的模型：THUMOS'14（每个时间步只有一个动作的稀疏注释数据集）、CHARADES 和 Multi-THUMOS（两个具有更复杂场景的密集注释数据集）。 JOADAA 在这两项任务的这些基准测试中均取得了 SOTA 结果。 本文提出一种联合在线动作检测与动作预测的统一框架JOADAA，同时解决两个任务中的信息缺失问题。 Mohammed Guermal,Francois Bremond,Rui Dai,Abid Ali cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sean Anthony Byrne,Virmarie Maquiling,Marcus Nyström,Enkelejda Kasneci,Diederick C. Niehorster
title: LEyes: A Lightweight Framework for Deep Learning-Based Eye Tracking using Synthetic Eye Images
title_zh: Leyes：使用合成眼睛图像进行基于深度学习的眼动追踪的轻量级框架
abstract: Deep learning has bolstered gaze estimation techniques, but real-world deployment has been impeded by inadequate training datasets. This problem is exacerbated by both hardware-induced variations in eye images and inherent biological differences across the recorded participants, leading to both feature and pixel-level variance that hinders the generalizability of models trained on specific datasets. While synthetic datasets can be a solution, their creation is both time and resource-intensive. To address this problem, we present a framework called Light Eyes or "LEyes" which, unlike conventional photorealistic methods, only models key image features required for video-based eye tracking using simple light distributions. LEyes facilitates easy configuration for training neural networks across diverse gaze-estimation tasks. We demonstrate that models trained using LEyes are consistently on-par or outperform other state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of pupil and CR localization across well-known datasets. In addition, a LEyes trained model outperforms the industry standard eye tracker using significantly more cost-effective hardware. Going forward, we are confident that LEyes will revolutionize synthetic data generation for gaze estimation models, and lead to significant improvements of the next generation video-based eye trackers.
summary: Deep learning has bolstered gaze estimation techniques, but real-world deployment has been impeded by inadequate training datasets. This problem is exacerbated by both hardware-induced variations in eye images and inherent biological differences across the recorded participants, leading to both feature and pixel-level variance that hinders the generalizability of models trained on specific datasets. While synthetic datasets can be a solution, their creation is both time and resource-intensive. To address this problem, we present a framework called Light Eyes or "LEyes" which, unlike conventional photorealistic methods, only models key image features required for video-based eye tracking using simple light distributions. LEyes facilitates easy configuration for training neural networks across diverse gaze-estimation tasks. We demonstrate that models trained using LEyes are consistently on-par or outperform other state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of pupil and CR localization across well-known datasets. In addition, a LEyes trained model outperforms the industry standard eye tracker using significantly more cost-effective hardware. Going forward, we are confident that LEyes will revolutionize synthetic data generation for gaze estimation models, and lead to significant improvements of the next generation video-based eye trackers.
abstract_zh: 深度学习增强了注视估计技术，但实际部署因训练数据集不足而受到阻碍。硬件引起的眼睛图像变化和记录的参与者之间固有的生物差异加剧了这个问题，导致特征和像素级差异，阻碍了在特定数据集上训练的模型的通用性。虽然合成数据集可以成为一种解决方案，但它们的创建既费时又费资源。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 Light Eyes 或“LEyes”的框架，与传统的真实感方法不同，它仅使用简单的光分布对基于视频的眼睛跟踪所需的关键图像特征进行建模。 Leyes 有助于轻松配置跨不同注视估计任务的神经网络训练。我们证明，在知名数据集的瞳孔和 CR 定位方面，使用 LEyes 训练的模型始终与其他最先进的算法持平或优于其他最先进的算法。此外，经过 Leyes 训练的模型使用更具成本效益的硬件，其性能优于行业标准眼动仪。展望未来，我们相信 Leyes 将彻底改变注视估计模型的合成数据生成，并导致下一代基于视频的眼动仪的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为LEyes的轻量级框架，利用合成眼动图像进行深度学习眼动追踪。
AI.motivation: 真实眼动追踪模型因训练数据集不足、硬件差异和生物差异导致泛化能力差，而传统合成数据集生成耗时耗资源。
AI.method: LEyes框架避免使用逼真渲染，仅通过简单光照分布建模眼动追踪所需的关键图像特征，便于配置以训练多种注视估计任务的神经网络。
AI.result: 基于LEyes训练的模型在瞳孔和角膜反射定位任务上达到或超越了现有最优算法，且使用更具成本效益的硬件时性能仍优于行业标准眼动追踪器。
AI.conclusion: LEyes将革新注视估计模型的合成数据生成方式，并推动下一代视频眼动追踪器的显著改进。

ai_content.motivation: 真实眼动追踪模型因训练数据集不足、硬件差异和生物差异导致泛化能力差，而传统合成数据集生成耗时耗资源。

search_text: LEyes: A Lightweight Framework for Deep Learning-Based Eye Tracking using Synthetic Eye Images Leyes：使用合成眼睛图像进行基于深度学习的眼动追踪的轻量级框架 Deep learning has bolstered gaze estimation techniques, but real-world deployment has been impeded by inadequate training datasets. This problem is exacerbated by both hardware-induced variations in eye images and inherent biological differences across the recorded participants, leading to both feature and pixel-level variance that hinders the generalizability of models trained on specific datasets. While synthetic datasets can be a solution, their creation is both time and resource-intensive. To address this problem, we present a framework called Light Eyes or "LEyes" which, unlike conventional photorealistic methods, only models key image features required for video-based eye tracking using simple light distributions. LEyes facilitates easy configuration for training neural networks across diverse gaze-estimation tasks. We demonstrate that models trained using LEyes are consistently on-par or outperform other state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of pupil and CR localization across well-known datasets. In addition, a LEyes trained model outperforms the industry standard eye tracker using significantly more cost-effective hardware. Going forward, we are confident that LEyes will revolutionize synthetic data generation for gaze estimation models, and lead to significant improvements of the next generation video-based eye trackers. 深度学习增强了注视估计技术，但实际部署因训练数据集不足而受到阻碍。硬件引起的眼睛图像变化和记录的参与者之间固有的生物差异加剧了这个问题，导致特征和像素级差异，阻碍了在特定数据集上训练的模型的通用性。虽然合成数据集可以成为一种解决方案，但它们的创建既费时又费资源。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为 Light Eyes 或“LEyes”的框架，与传统的真实感方法不同，它仅使用简单的光分布对基于视频的眼睛跟踪所需的关键图像特征进行建模。 Leyes 有助于轻松配置跨不同注视估计任务的神经网络训练。我们证明，在知名数据集的瞳孔和 CR 定位方面，使用 LEyes 训练的模型始终与其他最先进的算法持平或优于其他最先进的算法。此外，经过 Leyes 训练的模型使用更具成本效益的硬件，其性能优于行业标准眼动仪。展望未来，我们相信 Leyes 将彻底改变注视估计模型的合成数据生成，并导致下一代基于视频的眼动仪的显着改进。 提出一种名为LEyes的轻量级框架，利用合成眼动图像进行深度学习眼动追踪。 Sean Anthony Byrne,Virmarie Maquiling,Marcus Nyström,Enkelejda Kasneci,Diederick C. authors_text: Chunqing Ruan,Hongjian Wang
title: Dynamic Visual Prompt Tuning for Parameter Efficient Transfer Learning
title_zh: 动态视觉提示调整参数高效迁移学习
abstract: Parameter efficient transfer learning (PETL) is an emerging research spot that aims to adapt large-scale pre-trained models to downstream tasks. Recent advances have achieved great success in saving storage and computation costs. However, these methods do not take into account instance-specific visual clues for visual tasks. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Visual Prompt Tuning framework (DVPT), which can generate a dynamic instance-wise token for each image. In this way, it can capture the unique visual feature of each image, which can be more suitable for downstream visual tasks. We designed a Meta-Net module that can generate learnable prompts based on each image, thereby capturing dynamic instance-wise visual features. Extensive experiments on a wide range of downstream recognition tasks show that DVPT achieves superior performance than other PETL methods. More importantly, DVPT even outperforms full fine-tuning on 17 out of 19 downstream tasks while maintaining high parameter efficiency. Our code will be released soon.
summary: Parameter efficient transfer learning (PETL) is an emerging research spot that aims to adapt large-scale pre-trained models to downstream tasks. Recent advances have achieved great success in saving storage and computation costs. However, these methods do not take into account instance-specific visual clues for visual tasks. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Visual Prompt Tuning framework (DVPT), which can generate a dynamic instance-wise token for each image. In this way, it can capture the unique visual feature of each image, which can be more suitable for downstream visual tasks. We designed a Meta-Net module that can generate learnable prompts based on each image, thereby capturing dynamic instance-wise visual features. Extensive experiments on a wide range of downstream recognition tasks show that DVPT achieves superior performance than other PETL methods. More importantly, DVPT even outperforms full fine-tuning on 17 out of 19 downstream tasks while maintaining high parameter efficiency. Our code will be released soon.
abstract_zh: 参数高效迁移学习（PETL）是一个新兴的研究热点，旨在使大规模预训练模型适应下游任务。最近的进展在节省存储和计算成本方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些方法没有考虑视觉任务的特定于实例的视觉线索。在本文中，我们提出了动态视觉提示调整框架（DVPT），它可以为每个图像生成动态实例标记。这样，它可以捕获每幅图像独特的视觉特征，从而更适合下游视觉任务。我们设计了一个 Meta-Net 模块，可以根据每个图像生成可学习的提示，从而捕获动态的实例视觉特征。对各种下游识别任务的大量实验表明，DVPT 比其他 PETL 方法具有更优越的性能。更重要的是，DVPT 甚至在 19 个下游任务中的 17 个上优于完全微调，同时保持高参数效率。我们的代码很快就会发布。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种动态视觉提示调优框架（DVPT），用于参数高效的迁移学习，旨在将大规模预训练模型高效适配到下游视觉任务。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效迁移学习方法未考虑实例特定的视觉线索，无法捕捉每张图像独有的视觉特征，限制了在下游视觉任务上的性能。
AI.method: 设计了Meta-Net模块，能够基于每张图像生成可学习的动态实例级提示token，从而捕获实例特有的视觉特征，实现动态视觉提示调优。
AI.result: 在19个下游识别任务中，DVPT在17个任务上超越了全微调方法，同时保持了高参数效率，性能优于其他PETL方法。
AI.conclusion: DVPT通过动态实例级提示有效提升了参数高效迁移学习在下游视觉任务上的表现，证明实例感知的视觉提示设计是可行且高效的。

search_text: Dynamic Visual Prompt Tuning for Parameter Efficient Transfer Learning 动态视觉提示调整参数高效迁移学习 Parameter efficient transfer learning (PETL) is an emerging research spot that aims to adapt large-scale pre-trained models to downstream tasks. Recent advances have achieved great success in saving storage and computation costs. However, these methods do not take into account instance-specific visual clues for visual tasks. In this paper, we propose a Dynamic Visual Prompt Tuning framework (DVPT), which can generate a dynamic instance-wise token for each image. In this way, it can capture the unique visual feature of each image, which can be more suitable for downstream visual tasks. We designed a Meta-Net module that can generate learnable prompts based on each image, thereby capturing dynamic instance-wise visual features. Extensive experiments on a wide range of downstream recognition tasks show that DVPT achieves superior performance than other PETL methods. More importantly, DVPT even outperforms full fine-tuning on 17 out of 19 downstream tasks while maintaining high parameter efficiency. Our code will be released soon. 参数高效迁移学习（PETL）是一个新兴的研究热点，旨在使大规模预训练模型适应下游任务。最近的进展在节省存储和计算成本方面取得了巨大成功。然而，这些方法没有考虑视觉任务的特定于实例的视觉线索。在本文中，我们提出了动态视觉提示调整框架（DVPT），它可以为每个图像生成动态实例标记。这样，它可以捕获每幅图像独特的视觉特征，从而更适合下游视觉任务。我们设计了一个 Meta-Net 模块，可以根据每个图像生成可学习的提示，从而捕获动态的实例视觉特征。对各种下游识别任务的大量实验表明，DVPT 比其他 PETL 方法具有更优越的性能。更重要的是，DVPT 甚至在 19 个下游任务中的 17 个上优于完全微调，同时保持高参数效率。我们的代码很快就会发布。 提出了一种动态视觉提示调优框架（DVPT），用于参数高效的迁移学习，旨在将大规模预训练模型高效适配到下游视觉任务。 Chunqing Ruan,Hongjian Wang cs.CV
